hf:2603.13962.task: Grounded EHR question answering on local hardware without cloud infrastructure
hf:2603.13962.key_results: Competitive performance on ArchEHR-QA leaderboards on commodity hardware; above-average on 2/4 subtasks; smaller models approach large system performance
hf:2603.13962.comments: Privacy-preserving EHR QA is feasible locally; practical for clinical deployment constraints.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Privacy-preserving EHR QA is feasible with local models on commodity hardware
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: competitive leaderboard performance without external APIs; practical for clinics

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70578-x.task: Determine high-resolution structures of ATP synthase and respiratory supercomplexes in native mitochondrial membranes
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70578-x.key_results: Resolved FoF1 ATP synthase as dimers and tetramers stabilized by IF₁; identified new respiratory supercomplex compositions including CI₁CIII₂CIV₃ and CI₂CIII₂CIV₆ mega-complex
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70578-x.comments: Cryo-EM on native SMPs elegantly bridges structural and functional studies, though the absence of discrete lipid density in the c₈-ring warrants further investigation.

outputs: 3D structures of FoF1 dimers and tetramers
electron density maps of Fo domain and e-subunit–c₈-ring interface

hypotheses.hypothesis: Tetrameric FoF1 units contribute to cristae tip shaping in mammalian mitochondria
hypotheses.result: Tetrameric assemblies of FoF1–IF₁ dimers identified in native membrane

hypotheses.hypothesis: Multiple respiratory supercomplex compositions exist in mammalian mitochondria
hypotheses.result: Identified previously unreported CI₁CIII₂CIV₃ and CI₂CIII₂CIV₆ assemblies alongside known compositions

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70611-z.task: Map mutational effects on IAPP amyloid nucleation across 1916 variants
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70611-z.key_results: Residues 15-32 are mutation-sensitive with core constraints at 21-27; nucleation-slowing mutations correlate between IAPP and Aβ, but nucleation-accelerating mutations do not transfer predictively
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70611-z.comments: Deep mutational scanning provides unprecedented coverage, but the lack of predictive transfer of acceleration mutations between amyloids suggests distinct nucleation mechanisms despite sequence conservation.

inputs: islet amyloid polypeptide variants (substitutions, insertions, truncations, deletions)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Residues 15-32 form a structured core in amyloid fibrils and early aggregates
hypotheses.result: This region shows highest sensitivity to mutation and matches in vitro nucleation intermediates

hypotheses.hypothesis: Nucleation mechanisms are conserved between IAPP and Aβ amyloids
hypotheses.result: Only mutations that slow nucleation correlate; acceleration mutations are amyloid-specific

nature:10.1038/s41556-026-01908-w.task: Elucidate kinase-mediated regulation of pyrenoid condensate size and dynamics during cell cycle
nature:10.1038/s41556-026-01908-w.key_results: KEY1 kinase regulates pyrenoid size by phosphorylating EPYC1 linker protein to disrupt Rubisco–EPYC1 interactions; key1 mutants exhibit multiple small condensates that fail to dissolve
nature:10.1038/s41556-026-01908-w.comments: The mechanistic model elegantly connects kinase activity to phase separation control, though the regulatory factors determining condensate position and the role of additional post-translational modifications remain to be explored.

outputs: temporal dynamics of size and number

hypotheses.hypothesis: KEY1 regulates pyrenoid size by disrupting phase separation via EPYC1 phosphorylation
hypotheses.result: KEY1 localizes to condensates and phosphorylates EPYC1 to weaken Rubisco–EPYC1 interactions, promoting dissolution

hypotheses.hypothesis: KEY1 is necessary for normal pyrenoid dissolution during cell division
hypotheses.result: key1 mutants retain multiple smaller condensates throughout cell cycle and fail to dissolve during division

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69830-1.task: Elucidate mechanism of polar chromosome rescue from missegregation
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69830-1.key_results: Spindle elongation drives astral microtubule pivoting around centrosome repositioning polar chromosomes; Eg5/KIF11 activity determines pivoting direction and extent; polar chromosomes form mono-lateral attachments lacking Astrin
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69830-1.comments: The pivoting mechanism provides an elegant solution to chromosome congression errors, though the energetic cost and timing constraints of this rescue process warrant further investigation.

model_io.model: mammalian cell mitosis with polar chromosome positioning

hypotheses.hypothesis: Spindle elongation rescues polar chromosomes from behind the pole via microtubule pivoting
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; enhanced Eg5 activity accelerates polar chromosome resolution

hypotheses.hypothesis: Mono-lateral attachments on polar chromosomes differ from bi-lateral attachments
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; reduced Astrin recruitment and partial Mad2 localization observed

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70631-9.task: Identify and characterize MAPK scaffold regulation in yeast sexual differentiation
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70631-9.key_results: Sms1 hemi-arrestin protein scaffolds MAPK cascade at PIP2-rich plasma membrane patches; phosphorylation by MAPK creates negative feedback suppressing membrane translocation; polarized growth and signal localization require Sms1-kinase interactions
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70631-9.comments: The convergent evolution of MAPK scaffolds across structural folds suggests functional constraints that transcend protein architecture, implying robust signaling design principles.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Sms1 functions as essential MAPK cascade scaffold despite hemi-arrestin fold
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; Sms1 recruits and activates each MAP kinase in cascade

hypotheses.hypothesis: MAPK-mediated phosphorylation of Sms1 creates negative feedback
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; phosphorylation antagonizes membrane translocation preventing untimely mating

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70679-7.task: Characterize IRE1α activity dynamics during chronic ER stress
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70679-7.key_results: IRE1α exhibits "up-down-up" fluctuation pattern; calreticulin-IRE1α interaction inversely correlates with Ca²⁺ concentration showing "down-up-down" pattern; circadian oscillation of IRE1α phosphorylation observed in mouse liver
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70679-7.comments: The calcium-mediated mechanism elegantly explains how cells sustain intermediate UPR signaling during prolonged stress, though the functional consequences of these oscillations on cell fate remain to be fully elucidated.

model_io.model: pharmacologically-induced chronic ER stress in cultured cells and mouse liver

hypotheses.hypothesis: Calcium depletion reduces calreticulin-IRE1α binding, allowing IRE1α activation
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; Ca²⁺ concentration negatively correlates with interaction intensity

hypotheses.hypothesis: Circadian regulation modulates ER stress responses
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; rhythmic oscillation of calreticulin-IRE1α interaction in mouse liver

nature:10.1038/s42003-026-09862-x.task: Determine role of Chk1-mediated β-tubulin phosphorylation in spindle assembly
nature:10.1038/s42003-026-09862-x.key_results: Chk1 phosphorylates β-tubulin-T285 at mitotic centrosomes; impaired phosphorylation causes reduced spindle density, delayed anaphase, chromosome misalignment, and unequal cell division; ATR-ATRIP-TopBP1 pathway recruits Chk1 to centrosomes
nature:10.1038/s42003-026-09862-x.comments: The coupling of DNA damage checkpoint kinases to normal mitotic spindle assembly suggests evolutionary conservation of checkpoint mechanisms even under unperturbed conditions.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Chk1 is required for optimal spindle assembly during normal mitosis
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; Chk1 knockout and β-tubulin-T285 mutations impair spindle function

hypotheses.hypothesis: ATR pathway promotes Chk1 centrosomal localization during mitosis
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; ATRIP-ATR-TopBP1 interaction essential for Chk1 activation at centrosomes

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70065-3.task: Learning topographic organization in visual cortex models via lateral connectivity
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70065-3.key_results: Deep neural networks with local lateral connections spontaneously develop cortex-like topographic maps across visual hierarchy without explicit topography objectives; improved adversarial robustness
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70065-3.comments: Emergent organization without inductive bias is compelling, but the relationship between lateral connectivity strength and map robustness remains underexplored.

model_io.model: Deep neural networks with local lateral connections

hypotheses.hypothesis: Local lateral connections alone drive cortex-like topographic map formation
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: modular organization emerges without explicit topography-inducing objectives

hypotheses.hypothesis: Lateral connectivity improves adversarial robustness
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: networks with lateral connections show improved robustness to adversarial perturbations

nature:10.1038/s41597-026-07069-7.task: Curating and annotating human viral integration sites
nature:10.1038/s41597-026-07069-7.key_results: 270,000+ manually curated VISs from 209 publications covering 11 viruses; 3.5-fold increase over previous version with standardized genomic coordinates and regulatory annotations
nature:10.1038/s41597-026-07069-7.comments: Comprehensive resource but relies on manual curation which may introduce inconsistencies; limited to published data and subject to publication bias.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44499-0.task: Multimodal stress detection integrating EEG and ECG via attention fusion
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44499-0.key_results: 95.7% accuracy in stress classification (3-way: neutral/tense/positive) using EEG+ECG fusion vs 82.3% EEG-only and 85.6% ECG-only; validated on WESAD and CASE datasets
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44499-0.comments: Strong improvement from multimodal fusion and attention mechanisms, but limited to two datasets and modest sample size (35 subjects per dataset); generalization to diverse populations unclear.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Multimodal EEG+ECG fusion improves stress classification over unimodal approaches
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: 95.7% accuracy vs 82.3% (EEG) and 85.6% (ECG)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Attention-weighted fusion effectively combines complementary EEG and ECG signals
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: EEG and ECG signals enhance each other's stress assessment capability

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70512-1.task: Engineering high-yield pyomelanin biosynthesis from methanol
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70512-1.key_results: 66-fold increase in homogentisic acid yield through balancing three biosynthetic modules; final strain Pyo29 achieved 70.5 ± 0.7 g/L pyomelanin titer after 204 h fermentation in 5-L fermenter
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70512-1.comments: The engineering strategy elegantly combines directed evolution and rational design with a clever color-screening system, though the mechanism for comparing oxidative polymerization versus laccase-catalyzed synthesis could be more mechanistically detailed.

model_io.model: Engineered K. phaffii metabolic pathway for pyomelanin production

hypotheses.hypothesis: Balancing three biosynthetic modules increases precursor yield
hypotheses.result: 66-fold increase in homogentisic acid titer achieved through module optimization

hypotheses.hypothesis: Directed evolution and semirational design improve pathway enzyme activity
hypotheses.result: Enhanced 3-deoxy-D-arabinoheptulosonate 7-phosphate synthase and hydroxyphenylpyruvate dioxygenase variants improved flux

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70627-5.task: Characterizing mechanistic basis of epistasis in protein evolution
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70627-5.key_results: Comprehensive analysis of 14,000+ double mutants in TEM-1 β-lactamase α-helix; two-state stability model predicts ~80% of epistatic effects; systematic deviations occur only when residues directly interact in 3D structure
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70627-5.comments: The finding that most epistasis is predictable from additive single-mutation effects is encouraging for evolution modeling, but the structural exceptions suggest context-dependent effects remain difficult to generalize across proteins.

model_io.model: Two-state protein stability model with additive contributions
Statistical models trained on homologous sequences
inputs: Sequence alignments from distant TEM-1 homologs

hypotheses.hypothesis: Destabilizing/neutral/stabilizing mutations contribute additively to stability phenotype
hypotheses.result: Model explains most epistatic effects consistently across fitness and MIC measures

hypotheses.hypothesis: Direct 3D structural interactions cause deviations from additive model
hypotheses.result: Systematic deviations occur specifically at residue pairs with direct contacts in folded structure

hf:2603.16790.task: Code generation for industrial hardware and embedded systems
hf:2603.16790.key_results: Competitive on general benchmarks; strong baselines across chip design, GPU optimization, embedded systems, compiler optimization
hf:2603.16790.comments: First 32B model unifying code intelligence across diverse industrial domains via curated annealing and extended context training.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Curated industrial code annealing and extended context (8K→128K) improves performance on specialized domains
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via 14 general + 9 industrial benchmarks

hf:2603.15726.task: Complex long-horizon reasoning and research tasks
hf:2603.15726.key_results: State-of-the-art on deep research, scientific reasoning, financial analysis benchmarks

hypotheses.hypothesis: Agentic mid-training with structured planning improves reliability of interaction steps
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via improved multi-step reasoning across benchmarks

hypotheses.hypothesis: Verification at both local and global levels reduces hallucinations

hf:2603.13398.task: End-to-end document parsing and understanding via image-to-Markdown
hf:2603.13398.key_results: 93.12 OmniDocBench v1.5, 79.8 OlmOCR Bench; outperforms Gemini-3.1-Pro on key information extraction
hf:2603.13398.comments: Layout-as-Thought mechanism recovers explicit layout analysis while improving accuracy on complex layouts without explicit layout head.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Optional thinking phase with layout tokens improves accuracy on complex layouts

hf:2603.13366.task: Mitigating hallucinations in multimodal reasoning via entropy-aware decoding
hf:2603.13366.key_results: Effective hallucination mitigation across multiple MLRMs and VQA benchmarks
hf:2603.13366.comments: Latent Entropy-Aware Decoding (LEAD) is a plug-and-play strategy leveraging probability distributions rather than discrete tokens during high-entropy states.

hypotheses.hypothesis: High-entropy transition words are associated with hallucinations
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via observation that entropy-aware mode switching reduces hallucinations

hypotheses.hypothesis: Probability-weighted continuous embeddings outperform discrete tokens under high entropy
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via extensive MLRM experiments

hf:2603.16669.task: 4D action-conditioned robotic simulation with physics-plausible interactions
hf:2603.16669.key_results: Zero-shot transfer capability; physically-plausible geometry-consistent interactions; Robo4D-200k dataset of 201,426 episodes
hf:2603.16669.comments: Disentangles robot control (URDF kinematics) from environmental reactions; pointmap projection enables precise 4D robot control tracking.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Precise 4D robot kinematics + generative environment modeling enables physics-plausible simulation
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via zero-shot transfer and geometry consistency evaluation

hf:2603.16870.task: Uncovering reasoning mechanisms in diffusion-based video models
hf:2603.16870.key_results: Chain-of-Steps (CoS) mechanism emerges along denoising steps, not frames; model explores multiple solutions then converges
hf:2603.16870.comments: Challenges prior Chain-of-Frames assumption; identifies working memory, self-correction, and perception-before-action as emergent behaviors.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Video reasoning unfolds primarily along diffusion denoising steps, not sequentially across frames
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via probing experiments and qualitative analysis

hypotheses.hypothesis: Self-evolved layer specialization exists: early=perception, middle=reasoning, late=consolidation
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via depth-wise functional analysis

hf:2603.16871.task: Interactive 3D gaming worlds with precise action control and long-horizon consistency
hf:2603.16871.key_results: Camera pose-based control substantially outperforms state-of-the-art; 3,000 minutes human gameplay dataset with camera trajectories
hf:2603.16871.comments: Establishes camera pose as unifying geometric representation for both action control and 3D consistency via Lie algebra.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Global camera poses enable geometrically consistent location revisiting in long-horizon navigation
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via visual quality and spatial consistency metrics

hf:2603.16448.task: Text-to-SQL parsing over unknown database schemas via tool-integrated RL
hf:2603.16448.key_results: 30.6% absolute improvement (4B), 16.6% (8B) over base models; matches baselines without pre-loaded metadata
hf:2603.16448.comments: Formulates task as POMDP; Dual-Track GRPO strategy with token-level masked advantages resolves credit assignment.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Structured four-phase protocol with verified metadata improves reasoning grounding
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via 9.9% relative GRPO improvement via Dual-Track strategy

hf:2603.16856.task: Online continuous improvement of LLMs from deployment experience
hf:2603.16856.key_results: Consistent improvements across iterations; enhanced task accuracy and token efficiency; preserved out-of-distribution performance
hf:2603.16856.comments: Two-stage loop: extract experiential knowledge, consolidate via on-policy context distillation; no user-side environment access required.

model_io.model: Language model with on-policy context distillation

hypotheses.hypothesis: Extracted experiential knowledge is more effective than raw trajectories
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via iterative improvement experiments

hypotheses.hypothesis: On-policy consistency between knowledge source and policy is critical
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via ablation studies

hf:2603.08262.task: Evaluating LLM agents on real-world financial tool use and execution
hf:2603.08262.key_results: 760 executable financial tools, 295 tool-required queries; FATR baseline enhances stability and compliance
hf:2603.08262.comments: First runnable benchmark coupling real financial APIs; assesses timeliness, intent type, regulatory alignment beyond binary success.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Finance-aware tool retrieval improves compliance and stability
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via FATR baseline results

hf:2603.15132.task: Pixel-space diffusion via waypoint-guided trajectory planning
hf:2603.15132.key_results: 2.2x acceleration of JiT training convergence on ImageNet 256x256; beats strong pixel-space baselines
hf:2603.15132.comments: Untangles trajectory conflicts via intermediate semantic waypoints from pre-trained vision models; breaks optimal transport into prior-waypoint and waypoint-pixel segments.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Intermediate waypoints reduce trajectory conflicts in pixel-space diffusion
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via convergence acceleration and quality improvements

hf:2603.16139.task: Efficient visual generation pre-training for unified multimodal models via image-only data
hf:2603.16139.key_results: IOMM-B (3.6B): 0.89 GenEval, 0.55 WISE; 1050 H800 GPU hours; outperforms BAGEL-7B, BLIP3-o-4B
hf:2603.16139.comments: Two-stage framework decouples visual pre-training (image-only) from fine-tuning (paired); removes dependency on scarce paired data.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Image-only pre-training improves efficiency without sacrificing quality
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via SOTA generative metrics

hf:2603.13875.task: Compressed context memory via test-time gradient descent
hf:2603.13875.key_results: Outperforms forward-only memory writers on key-value retrieval; competitive on natural language tasks (bAbI, SQuAD variants)
hf:2603.13875.comments: GradMem writes context into compact prefix tokens via test-time optimization; loss-driven approach with iterative error correction.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Gradient-based context writing outperforms forward-only methods at comparable memory size
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via synthetic and natural language benchmarks

hf:2603.09022.task: Stabilizing multi-turn multi-agent LLM game performance via context optimization
hf:2603.09022.comments: MEMO couples retention (memory bank from trajectories) with exploration (tournament-style prompt evolution); operates entirely at inference time.

model_io.model: Multi-agent LLM game player with MEMO optimization

hypotheses.hypothesis: Context optimization via retention and exploration improves multi-agent game performance
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via significant win rate improvements

hf:2603.16869.task: 3D part segmentation via repurposed generative model priors
hf:2603.16869.key_results: 40% improvement on interactive segmentation, 15% on full segmentation; uses 0.32% of labeled training data vs. discriminative approaches
hf:2603.16869.comments: Leverages native 3D generative priors without distillation; part-indicative colorization on active voxels enables efficient supervision.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Pretrained 3D generative priors transfer effectively to part segmentation with limited supervision
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via data efficiency and accuracy gains

hf:2603.14465.task: Evaluating step-level process quality in tool-using agent trajectories
hf:2603.14465.key_results: 1,000 diverse trajectories, 8,509 human-labeled steps (89.1% inter-annotator agreement); reveals inflated correct-step ratios from early termination
hf:2603.14465.comments: Ternary labeling captures exploration; error propagation rule reduces ambiguity; process-derived signals enhance outcome supervision.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Process-level signals provide complementary value to outcome supervision
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via test-time scaling improvements

hf:2603.15401.task: Measuring marginal utility of agent skills in real-world software engineering
hf:2603.15401.key_results: 39/49 skills yield zero improvement; average +1.2%; only 7 skills produce meaningful gains (up to +30%)
hf:2603.15401.comments: First requirement-driven benchmark isolating skill utility; 565 task instances across 6 SWE subdomains with deterministic verification.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Agent skills have narrow utility dependent on domain fit and contextual compatibility
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via paired evaluation revealing limited improvements

hf:2603.16867.task: Efficient on-device reasoning for mobile LLMs via LoRA adapters
hf:2603.16867.key_results: Achieves accurate reasoning under strict edge constraints; dynamic adapter-switching + KV-cache sharing reduce latency
hf:2603.16867.comments: Combines supervised fine-tuning with budget-forcing RL; parallel test-time scaling improves accuracy at minor latency cost.

model_io.model: Qwen2.5-7B with LoRA adapters + dynamic switching

hypotheses.hypothesis: Budget forcing via RL significantly reduces response length with minimal accuracy loss
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via mobile deployment experiments

hf:2603.16859.task: Benchmarking audio-visual social interactivity in omni-modal LLMs
hf:2603.16859.key_results: 2,000 perception samples; 209 diagnostic generation instances; reveals decoupling between perception and interruption generation
hf:2603.16859.comments: Operationalizes conversational interactivity across speaker ID, interruption timing, and generation; tests robustness to audio-visual inconsistency.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Understanding-centric metrics alone are insufficient for conversational social competence
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via perception-interaction decoupling analysis

hf:2603.16864.task: Interactive video super-resolution with sparse keyframe control
hf:2603.16864.key_results: Up to 24.6% CLIP-IQA, 21.8% DOVER, 5.6% MUSIQ improvement; supports old-film restoration and style transfer
hf:2603.16864.comments: Keyframe-conditioned latent-pixel two-stage training; reference-free guidance balances keyframe adherence and blind restoration.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Keyframe-driven propagation improves temporal consistency over blind restoration
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via benchmark improvements and out-of-box task transfer

hf:2603.15929.task: AI-assisted formal proof development for plasma physics via Lean 4
hf:2603.15929.key_results: Complete formalization of Vlasov-Maxwell-Landau equilibrium in 10 days at $200 cost; single mathematician supervised zero-code process
hf:2603.15929.comments: Full transparency: 229 human prompts + 213 git commits archived; identifies AI failure modes (hypothesis creep, definition bugs) and what works.

model_io.model: Gemini DeepThink (conjecture→proof) + Claude Code (translation) + Aristotle (lemma closing)

hypotheses.hypothesis: AI reasoning models can generate correct proofs from conjectures without human code writing
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via Lean kernel verification; formalization completed before math paper draft

hf:2603.16844.task: Monocular Gaussian Splatting SLAM with multi-view foundation models

hf:2603.16844.comments: M³ augments multi-view foundation model with dedicated Matching head for fine-grained dense correspondences; dynamic area suppression stabilizes tracking.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Dense correspondence matching improves pose precision over feed-forward foundation models
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via state-of-the-art pose and reconstruction accuracy

hf:2603.09821.task: Agentic LLM evaluation from natural-language requests with automated workflow generation
hf:2603.09821.key_results: Converts NL requests into executable, traceable, customizable evaluation workflows; end-to-end evaluation from diverse requests with minimal effort
hf:2603.09821.comments: One-Eval integrates NL2Bench, BenchResolve, and Metrics & Reporting with human-in-the-loop checkpoints and sample evidence trails.

hypotheses.hypothesis: End-to-end agentic evaluation reduces manual effort in benchmark setup and execution
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via practical deployment in industrial settings

hf:2603.16189.task: Reliable SVG generation via chain-of-thought reasoning and multi-reward RL
hf:2603.16189.key_results: Higher task success rates, superior SVG code quality, exceptional visual fidelity; outperforms existing SVG generation methods
hf:2603.16189.comments: CTRL-S introduces CoT mechanism for explicit reasoning; SVG-Sophia dataset (145K samples); GRPO with multi-reward (DINO, similarity, format, efficiency).

hypotheses.hypothesis: Multi-reward GRPO optimization improves SVG structural coherence and visual fidelity

hf:2603.16309.task: Machine translation for 1,600 languages via specialized LLM adaptation

hf:2603.16309.comments: First MT system at this scale; decoder-only (OMT-LLaMA) and encoder-decoder (OMT-NLLB) variants; BOUQuET and Met-BOUQuET human evaluation benchmarks.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Specialization advantage enables strong MT performance with smaller models than general LLMs

hf:2603.14152.task: Structural control for native 3D generation via skeleton-based adaptation
hf:2603.14152.key_results: Robust skeletal control; preserves geometry/texture quality; enables region-specific 3D editing; Objaverse-TMS (24k text-mesh-skeleton pairs)

hf:2603.15600.task: Process supervision for long-horizon robotic manipulation via video MLLM criticism

hf:2603.15600.comments: PRIMO R1 transforms passive observer MLLMs into active critics via outcome-based RL; explicitly anchors video between initial/current states.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Outcome-based RL incentivizes explicit process reasoning for progress estimation

hf:2603.15854.task: Efficient exact sampling fused into LM-head matmul for fast token decoding
hf:2603.15854.key_results: Up to 19% latency reduction per output token in vLLM; reduces memory traffic and extra kernels; exact sampling without approximation
hf:2603.15854.comments: FlashSampling computes logits tile-by-tile, fuses Gumbel noise, performs hierarchical argmax; scales to H100/H200/B200/B300.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Fusing sampling into LM-head matmul improves decoding throughput without approximation
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via end-to-end latency improvements across GPU architectures

hf:2603.15653.task: Long-context handling via self-reflective program search on recursive context decomposition
hf:2603.15653.key_results: Up to 22% improvement over RLM under same time budget; consistent gains on short and long contexts; better on semantically intensive tasks
hf:2603.15653.comments: SRLM augments recursive decomposition with self-consistency, reasoning-length, and verbalized-confidence signals; no explicit recursion required.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Self-reflection guides program search better than heuristic recursion on semantically intensive tasks
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via RLM vs. SRLM comparisons and context-length ablations

hf:2603.16861.task: Robotic manipulation via zero-shot transfer from large-scale synthetic data
hf:2603.16861.key_results: Tabletop pick-and-place: 79.2% success (vs. π₀.5 39.2%); mobile manipulation on diverse unseen objects/environments; no real-world fine-tuning
hf:2603.16861.comments: MolmoBot-Engine procedural generation pipeline; 1.8M expert trajectories; Molmo2 VLM with flow-matching action head; outperforms π₀ architecture.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Large-scale procedural synthetic data enables zero-shot real-world transfer for manipulation
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via Franka and Rainbow Robotics experiments

hf:2603.16792.task: Pixel-space diffusion via representation-aligned visual co-denoising
hf:2603.16792.key_results: Outperforms pixel-space baselines at comparable size; uses fewer training epochs; ImageNet-256 improvements over REPA
hf:2603.16792.comments: V-Co systematic study isolates 4 key ingredients: dual-stream architecture, structured CFG, perceptual-drifting loss, RMS-based cross-stream calibration.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Proper cross-stream calibration via RMS rescaling stabilizes visual co-denoising
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via ImageNet-256 benchmark improvements

hf:2603.16649.task: Semantic-aware image stylization via Mixture of Experts architecture
hf:2603.16649.key_results: Preserves semantics and material details; outperforms color-driven methods; generalizes to unseen styles
hf:2603.16649.comments: StyleExpert uses MoE with similarity-aware gating for dynamic routing; unified style encoder embeds diverse styles into consistent latent space.

hypotheses.hypothesis: MoE routing handles diverse semantic levels (textures to deep semantics) better than unified models
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via stylization quality and generalization experiments

hf:2603.16063.task: Efficient linear attention adaptation for Vision Transformers
hf:2603.16063.key_results: Effective transfer of pretrained VFM knowledge to linear attention ViTs without training from scratch
hf:2603.16063.comments: ViT-AdaLA three stages: attention alignment (vanilla→linear), feature alignment (final-layer features), supervised fine-tuning; overcomes LLM linearization limitations.

model_io.model: ViT-AdaLA (linear attention ViT with knowledge transfer)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Feature-level alignment mitigates residual approximation errors from attention linearization
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via classification and segmentation task performance

hf:2603.12226.task: Systematic identification of interdisciplinary research insights via LLM reasoning
hf:2603.12226.key_results: 21% improvement in novelty, 16% in insightfulness over direct brainstorming; grounded in original research problem
hf:2603.12226.comments: Idea-Catalyst decomposes goals into target-domain questions, reformulates as domain-agnostic problems, retrieves from external disciplines.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Systematic interdisciplinary exploration improves novelty and insightfulness of research ideas
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via interdisciplinary insight quantification

hf:2603.16777.task: Anticipatory trajectory reasoning for multimodal agents via test-time RL
hf:2603.16777.key_results: Improved planning stability, execution robustness, generalization across 7 benchmarks (computer-use, tool-use reasoning)
hf:2603.16777.comments: TraceR1 two-stage RL: trajectory-level (global consistency) + grounded fine-tuning (step-level from execution feedback).

hypotheses.hypothesis: Anticipatory trajectory reasoning improves planning coherence over reactive action selection
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via multi-benchmark evaluation

hf:2603.16343.task: 3D human pose estimation from LiDAR via human-object interaction modeling
hf:2603.16343.key_results: Robust pose estimation under human-object interaction; mitigates spatial ambiguity and class imbalance in sparse regions
hf:2603.16343.comments: HOIL framework: HOICL contrastive learning (human-object discrimination) + CPPool (adaptive reallocation for interaction-frequent parts).

hypotheses.hypothesis: HOI-aware contrastive learning resolves spatial ambiguity in interaction regions
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via improved keypoint accuracy in hand/foot regions

hf:2603.16184.task: Compact multilingual ASR for Singapore via balanced fine-tuning
hf:2603.16184.key_results: Polyglot-Lion-1.7B achieves 14.85 average error rate (vs. 14.32 for 6x larger MERaLiON); 20x faster inference; $81 training cost
hf:2603.16184.comments: Balanced sampling per language; no language-tag conditioning; 0.6B and 1.7B parameter variants; publicly available corpora only.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Balanced fine-tuning enables language identification via implicit audio features
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via competitive error rates without language conditioning

hf:2603.16099.task: 3D scene generation via diffusion in unified 3D latent space with cross-view consistency
hf:2603.16099.key_results: Superior cross-view consistency vs. 2D-based methods; physically-plausible geometry; high-quality 3D scenes
hf:2603.16099.comments: OneWorld uses 3D-URAE (augments geometry with appearance/semantics); token-level CVC loss; Manifold-Drift Forcing mitigates exposure bias.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Diffusion in 3D space maintains cross-view consistency better than 2D latent approaches
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via consistency metrics vs. 2D baselines

hf:2603.16039.task: Understanding residual stream design via depth-wise duality with sequence-wise attention
hf:2603.16039.key_results: Clarifies design space via Transformer² perspective; unifies recent architectural innovations (ELC-BERT, Vertical Attention, DDL, DCA)
hf:2603.16039.comments: Establishes operator-level duality but notes systems-level asymmetry favors sequence-axis for autoregressive models; recommends DDL when shortcut is target.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Depth-wise causal attention is operationally equivalent to sequence-wise sliding-window attention
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via theoretical analysis and empirical alignment

hf:2603.14588.task: Mathematically-grounded agent memory with information-geometric foundations
hf:2603.14588.key_results: SuperLocalMemory V3: +12.7 pp on LoCoMo benchmark; 75% accuracy (no cloud), 87.7% (cloud-augmented); satisfies EU AI Act data sovereignty
hf:2603.14588.comments: Retrieval via Fisher information metric; lifecycle via Riemannian Langevin dynamics; contradictions via cellular sheaf cohomology; zero-LLM configuration.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Information-geometric foundations improve memory retrieval and contradiction detection vs. cosine similarity heuristics
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via LoCoMo benchmark and dialogue accuracy improvements

hf:2603.14326.task: Evaluating clinical reasoning in ECG interpretation by MLLMs
hf:2603.14326.key_results: Near-zero completion rates (6%) for multi-step logical deduction; models fail to ground findings to visual evidence despite possessing knowledge
hf:2603.14326.comments: ECG-Reasoning-Benchmark with 6,400+ samples across 17 diagnoses reveals critical gap: superficial pattern matching vs. actual reasoning.

hypotheses.hypothesis: MLLMs rely on superficial cues rather than step-by-step visual grounding for ECG diagnosis
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via near-zero completion rates despite high knowledge retrieval

hf:2603.15674.task: Multi-evidence probabilistic reasoning with formal guarantees
hf:2603.15674.key_results: 7 formal theorems: calibration (ECE≤ε+C/√K), PAC-Bayes bound (gap 0.0085), O(1/√K) calibration decay, 88% robustness with 50% adversarial corruption
hf:2603.15674.comments: Latent Posterior Factors (LPF): transforms VAE posteriors into soft factors; LPF-SPN (structured) vs. LPF-Learned (end-to-end) both theoretically grounded.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Formal uncertainty calibration improves trustworthiness in multi-evidence reasoning
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via seven theorems and empirical validation

hf:2603.15670.task: Multi-evidence probabilistic reasoning via learned latent posterior aggregation
hf:2603.15670.key_results: 97.8% accuracy, 1.4% ECE on FEVER; substantially outperforms evidential deep learning, LLMs, graph-based baselines
hf:2603.15670.comments: Bridges latent uncertainty with structured probabilistic reasoning; enables controlled comparison of reasoning paradigms under shared representation.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Structured factor-based inference outperforms learned aggregation on calibration and explainability
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via FEVER and synthetic domain evaluations

hf:2603.16587.task: Pan-cancer morphological analysis linking histology to molecular programs and outcomes
hf:2603.16587.key_results: 38 interpretable histomic features from 6,745 slides; recovers known biology; uncovers compartment-specific immune signals; 21 cancer types
hf:2603.16587.comments: HistoAtlas provides spatially-traceable, statistically-calibrated, multiple-testing-corrected associations; interactive web tool at histoatlas.com.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Routine H&E histology contains sufficient information for large-scale biomarker discovery without specialized staining
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via recovery of known biology and novel compartment-specific signals

hf:2603.16077.task: Compute-optimal masked diffusion language modeling via binary encoding
hf:2603.16077.key_results: 21.8x more compute-efficient than ARM; 7.77 perplexity (1.1B); 12.99 ARM, 18.94 MDM, 13.41 MDM-Prime baselines
hf:2603.16077.comments: MDM-Prime-v2 replaces BPE with binary encoding for tighter variational bound; index shuffling breaks position bias; superior zero-shot reasoning.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Binary encoding tightens variational bounds in partial-masking diffusion vs. BPE
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via compute-efficiency gains and perplexity improvements

hf:2603.16060.task: Hierarchical RL for mathematical reasoning via skill evolution
hf:2603.16060.key_results: Outperforms GRPO on competition math and Omni-MATH; strong out-of-distribution gains; library quality improves alongside reasoning
hf:2603.16060.comments: ARISE couples Skills Manager (maintains library via summarization) with Worker (response generation); hierarchical reward design guides co-evolution.

model_io.model: ARISE (hierarchical RL with skill manager + worker)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Reusable skill libraries improve generalization on OOD mathematical reasoning
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via out-of-distribution benchmark improvements

hf:2603.15118.task: Multimodal structured data extraction from documents across modalities
hf:2603.15118.key_results: 1,777 documents, 1,771 unique schemas; layout-preserving text provides +3-18pp accuracy gain; schema echo depresses small models by 45-65pp
hf:2603.15118.comments: VAREX tests 4 modalities per document; reverse annotation ensures deterministic ground truth; identifies compliance as bottleneck below 4B parameters.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Layout-preserving text is more informative than pixel-level visual cues for extraction
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via largest accuracy gains from layout modality

hf:2603.14704.task: Graph-theoretic planning for diffusion via trajectory conflict resolution
hf:2603.14704.key_results: Discovers context-aware trajectories; improved output quality/stability; reduced redundant computation; faster convergence
hf:2603.14704.comments: Chain-of-Trajectories (CoTj) uses Diffusion DNA (denoising difficulty signature) for DAG planning; Predict-Plan-Execute dynamically allocates computational effort.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Graph-theoretic planning reduces trajectory conflicts and improves diffusion quality
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via quality metrics and computational efficiency improvements

hf:2603.13627.task: Systematic analysis of chemical language models for molecular property prediction
hf:2603.13627.key_results: Hundreds of controlled experiments revealing effects of dataset size, model size, and standardization; comprehensive scaling analysis
hf:2603.13627.comments: BERTology study for molecules; addresses inconsistent/contradictory CLM results; provides numerical evidence and mechanistic understanding.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Scaling laws for encoder-only CLMs differ from decoder-only models due to masked prediction
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via systematic scaling experiments

hf:2603.12396.task: Efficient multi-turn agentic RAG via test-time pipeline optimization
hf:2603.12396.key_results: 5.6% EM improvement; 10.5% reduction in retrieval turns vs. Search-R1 baseline on HotpotQA/Natural Questions
hf:2603.12396.comments: Contextualization module + de-duplication module replace redundant retrievals; GPT-4.1-mini for contextualization yields best gains.

hypotheses.hypothesis: De-duplication and contextualization reduce redundant retrieval while improving reasoning
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via EM gain and turn reduction on multi-hop QA

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69985-x.task: Elucidate RPA-stimulation of Mer3 helicase processivity in meiotic crossover formation
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69985-x.key_results: Single-molecule magnetic tweezers show RPA interaction is required for Mer3 processivity under low DNA tension; mer3 RPA-binding mutant exhibits reduced crossover frequencies and accumulates unresolved recombination intermediates
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69985-x.comments: The work elegantly connects structural interfaces to functional outputs via single-molecule mechanics, though the physiological relevance of 'low DNA tension' conditions in vivo remains to be fully established.

hypotheses.hypothesis: RPA directly interacts with Mer3 to enhance helicase processivity
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via cross-linking mass spectrometry, structural modelling, and single-molecule assays

hypotheses.hypothesis: RPA binding to Mer3 is required for normal crossover formation
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: mer3 RPA-binding mutant shows reduced crossover frequencies and weakened DSB site recruitment

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70759-8.task: Determine mechanism of menthol inhibition of TRPV5 calcium channel
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70759-8.key_results: Menthol acts as slow blocker of TRPV5 ion conduction; cryo-EM structure shows menthol binding to W583 residue involved in permeation and gating
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70759-8.comments: The identification of menthol as a TRPV5 inhibitor has therapeutic potential, but the slow-blocking kinetics and selectivity over other TRP channels warrant further characterization.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Menthol inhibits TRPV5 through direct channel blockade
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: menthol acts as slow blocker and binds to W583 in the permeation pathway

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70837-x.task: Elucidate proton channel control of pH and carbonate chemistry in calcifying vesicles during biomineralization
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70837-x.key_results: Otop2l proton channel regulates vesicular pH and membrane proton conductance in sea urchin calcifying cells; Otop2l activated by alkaline pH and Mg2+/Ca2+ ions; alkaline intracellular conditions drive amorphous calcium carbonate (ACC) precursor formation
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70837-x.comments: The identification of Otop2l as a pH regulator in biomineralization provides mechanistic insight into calcifier vulnerability to ocean acidification, though the relative contributions of Otop2l versus other proton transporters remain to be quantified.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Proton channels control pH in calcifying vesicles to favor mineral precursor formation
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: Otop2l generates high intracellular proton conductance enabling alkaline conditions in ACC-forming endocytotic vesicles

hypotheses.hypothesis: Otop2l activation depends on ions and pH present in calcifying cells
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: Otop2l activated by alkaline pH, Mg2+, and Ca2+ ions

nature:10.1038/s41586-026-10282-4.task: Demonstrate in vivo magnetic resonance control of spin-correlated radical pair dynamics
nature:10.1038/s41586-026-10282-4.key_results: Radiofrequency magnetic fields near electron spin resonance frequency modify red fluorescent protein (mScarlet) emission in presence of flavin cofactor in C. elegans at room temperature; indicates radical pair coherence time >4 ns in vivo
nature:10.1038/s41586-026-10282-4.comments: This work represents a notable proof-of-concept for quantum effects in living organisms, though the practical utility for gene expression control and the coherence mechanisms require further validation.

inputs: radiofrequency magnetic field at ESR frequency

hypotheses.hypothesis: Magnetic fields can control spin-correlated radical pair reactions in vivo
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: radiofrequency fields modulate RFP-flavin fluorescence in live C. elegans with coherence time >4 ns

nature:10.1038/s41586-026-10235-x.task: In vivo site-specific CAR T cell generation without ex vivo manufacturing
nature:10.1038/s41586-026-10235-x.key_results: Therapeutic levels of CAR T cells generated in vivo in humanized mouse models of B cell aplasia, hematological and solid malignancies with stable, cell-specific transgene expression
nature:10.1038/s41586-026-10235-x.comments: Addresses major accessibility bottleneck by eliminating ex vivo manufacturing, though translation to clinical efficacy and off-target integration rates require further validation.

inputs: DNA donor template with CAR transgene (adeno-associated virus)
outputs: CAR T cells at therapeutic levels

hypotheses.hypothesis: In vivo site-specific integration can achieve stable, durable CAR T cell expression superior to transient expression or random integration
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: therapeutic-level CAR T cells generated in vivo with stable expression in humanized mouse tumor models

hypotheses.hypothesis: T cell-specific delivery optimization of both vectors improves targeting efficiency and reduces off-target effects
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: optimized vectors achieved CAR generation in vivo across multiple tumor models

nature:10.1038/s41418-026-01717-6.task: Clarify Caspase-8 and Caspase-11 roles in endotoxin-induced septic shock via CYLD
nature:10.1038/s41418-026-01717-6.key_results: Caspase-8 cleaves de-ubiquitinase CYLD to enable Caspase-11 expression; CYLD cleavage is the mechanistic link for Caspase-8's role in endotoxicity
nature:10.1038/s41418-026-01717-6.comments: Commentary paper identifying critical missing mechanistic link in sepsis; confirms interdependence of caspase cascades.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Caspase-8-mediated CYLD cleavage is required for Caspase-11 expression in endotoxicity
hypotheses.result: Confirmed by Liu et al. in cited work

nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08556-w.task: Sensitize BRCA1/2 wild-type ovarian cancer to PARP inhibitors via EGFR-targeted biguanide 4C
nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08556-w.key_results: Biguanide 4C inhibits EGFR, preventing nuclear BRCA2/Rad51 accumulation; promotes ubiquitination and degradation via c-Cbl; 4C+PARPi induces synthetic lethality
nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08556-w.comments: Novel non-genetic mechanism for PARP resistance with potential clinical application to BRCA wild-type tumors.

hypotheses.hypothesis: EGFR promotes HR activation by blocking BRCA2/Rad51 ubiquitination
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; 4C-mediated EGFR downregulation enhances c-Cbl binding and protein degradation

nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08585-5.task: Identify mitochondrial DNA release via VDAC1 as driver of innate immunity and vitiligo pathogenesis
nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08585-5.key_results: H₂O₂ induces MPTP opening followed by VDAC1 oligomerization, enabling selective mtDNA release under non-apoptotic conditions; mtDNA activates cGAS-STING and NLRP3; VDAC1 inhibition (VBIT-4) suppresses inflammation and alleviates vitiligo in mouse model
nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08585-5.comments: Reveals novel non-apoptotic mtDNA release mechanism with direct therapeutic implications for autoimmune depigmentation.

hypotheses.hypothesis: VDAC1-dependent mtDNA release is the critical link between oxidative stress and autoimmune signaling in vitiligo
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; VDAC1 inhibition suppresses downstream cascades and disease phenotype

nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08588-2.task: Investigate C4BPA as an anti-myogenic effector from DMD fibroadipogenic precursor cells
nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08588-2.key_results: DMD FAPs secretome enriched in 368 proteins including C4BPA; recombinant C4BPA impairs myotube formation, reduces myotube area and nuclei, downregulates myogenic markers; C4BPA silencing in DMD cultures partially restores myogenic capacity
nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08588-2.comments: Identifies novel FAP-secreted factor impairing muscle regeneration; suggests targetable intervention for DMD muscle degeneration.

model_io.model: Co-culture of healthy myoblasts with FAPs from healthy or DMD biopsies

inputs: healthy and DMD FAP culture supernatant

hypotheses.hypothesis: DMD FAPs exert anti-myogenic effects through elevated C4BPA secretion
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; C4BPA silencing partially restores myogenic capacity

nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08618-z.task: Elucidate DUSP12 protection of cells from ZNF622-mediated apoptosis and role in cell cycle progression
nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08618-z.key_results: DUSP12 interacts with ZNF622 via zinc-binding domain; DUSP12 dephosphorylates ZNF622 at Ser143; DUSP12 knockdown promotes stress-induced apoptosis and mitotic defects; ZNF622 overexpression increases pre-metaphase defects
nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08618-z.comments: Identifies novel DUSP12-ZNF622 axis regulating cell cycle and apoptosis, though direct phosphatase substrates beyond ZNF622 remain uncharacterized.

model_io.model: Cell culture models with DUSP12 and ZNF622 manipulation

hypotheses.hypothesis: DUSP12 protects cells by dephosphorylating ZNF622 at Ser143 to prevent apoptosis
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; phosphomimetic and dephosphorylation-deficient mutants show phenotypic divergence

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69856-5.task: Develop spatial causal disentanglement framework for single-cell and tissue perturbation modeling
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69856-5.key_results: Celcomen uses graph neural networks to disentangle intra- and inter-cellular gene regulation from spatial transcriptomics; validates disentanglement and causal structure identification; generates counterfactual post-perturbation predictions in glioblastoma, fetal spleen, and lung cancer
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69856-5.comments: Novel computational framework enabling virtual tissue perturbations; validates on clinically relevant samples, though interpretability of causal structures requires biological validation.

model_io.model: Celcomen (generative graph neural network on spatial transcriptomics data)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Spatial transcriptomics data contains causal structure retrievable via graph neural networks for perturbation modeling
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via simulations and validation in human glioblastoma, fetal spleen, mouse lung cancer

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70522-z.task: Elucidate KIF11 microtubule dynamics regulation and dendritic arborization in neurons
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70522-z.key_results: KIF11 depletion increases minus-end-out MT dynamics; MCLID mutations reduce MT dynamics and dendritic arborization; KIF11ΔCterm disrupts tetramer formation and MT crosslinking
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70522-z.comments: Reveals KIF11 as an MT dynamics rheostat and provides molecular insights into intellectual disability mechanism.

hypotheses.hypothesis: MCLID mutations impair KIF11 function to reduce MT dynamics and dendritic growth
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; temporal KIF11 inhibition increases MT dynamics and dendritic growth

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70677-9.task: Elucidate Cdc42 loss and oncogenic Kras synergy in driving necrotizing enterocolitis-like disease
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70677-9.key_results: Combined Cdc42 loss and oncogenic Kras in intestinal epithelium causes weight loss, necroptosis, ISC loss, altered Hippo signaling; single-cell transcriptomics shows dysregulated polarity, inflammation, necroptosis; suppression of YAP, IL-1, TNFα, or necroptosis rescues pathology
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70677-9.comments: Identifies polarity-YAP-IL1/TNFα-necroptosis axis as central to NEC pathogenesis; YAP emerges as critical integration node.

model_io.model: Epithelial-specific Cdc42 knockout with inducible oncogenic Kras mice
Therapeutic interventions (YAP, IL-1, TNFα, necroptosis inhibition)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Combined loss of polarity and Kras activation synergize to drive NEC-like disease via YAP-IL1/TNFα-necroptosis
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; blocking each component rescues pathology

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70842-0.task: Establish FGFR signaling role in establishing secretory cell identity gradients along airway proximal-distal axis
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70842-0.key_results: Secretory cells exhibit opposing gene-expression gradients: proximal (innate immunity), distal (lipid metabolism, antigen presentation); Fgfr2b maintains distal lipid biosynthesis and suppresses innate immunity; gradients established postnatally in common progenitors
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70842-0.comments: Elegant demonstration of morphogen-directed cell identity patterning; explains secretory cell specialization along anatomical axis.

model_io.model: Single-cell RNA-seq of airway secretory cells
inputs: lung tissue at different proximal-distal positions

hypotheses.hypothesis: Fgfr2b signaling establishes and maintains distal secretory cell identity
hypotheses.result: Confirmed in vivo and in organoids

nature:10.1038/s41556-026-01895-y.task: Elucidate TDP-43 regulation of paraspeckle condensation and neuroprotection
nature:10.1038/s41556-026-01895-y.key_results: TDP-43 inhibits NEAT1_2 condensation concentration-dependently; deletion of 3′-end UG repeats increases paraspeckle stability and cytoprotection in stressed neurons
nature:10.1038/s41556-026-01895-y.comments: Elegant mechanistic dissection of biomolecular condensate regulation with potential ALS therapeutic implications.

hypotheses.hypothesis: TDP-43 polymerization suppresses paraspeckle condensation in concentration-dependent manner
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; requires intact polymerization and RNA binding

hypotheses.hypothesis: Longer 3′-end UG repeats in NEAT1_2 correlate with worse ALS prognosis
hypotheses.result: Confirmed in patient cohorts

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40407-8.task: Evaluate cardioprotective effects of curcumin and piperine against obesity-induced oxidative stress
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40407-8.key_results: HFD rats show decreased cardiac antioxidants (CAT, GPx, SOD), increased oxidative stress (MDA, NO, ROS), reduced Na⁺/K⁺-ATPase activity, elevated inflammatory markers (TNF-α, IL-1, IL-6) and cardiac injury markers (troponin T, CK-MB); CUR+PIP intake suppressed oxidative stress, inflammation, and histological damage
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40407-8.comments: Demonstrates synergistic cardioprotection of curcumin and piperine; mechanism appears primarily antioxidant rather than directly targeting obesity.

outputs: cardiac injury markers (troponin T, CK-MB, myoglobin)

hypotheses.hypothesis: CUR+PIP supplementation protects against obesity-induced cardiac oxidative stress and inflammation
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; suppressed MDA, NO, ROS, inflammatory markers, and cardiac injury

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42663-0.task: Model seizure suppression via optogenetic astrocyte stimulation and neuron inhibition using computational approach
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42663-0.key_results: Astrocytic ChR2 stimulation reduces seizure severity by enhancing Na⁺ influx and Na⁺/K⁺-ATPase activity, clearing extracellular K⁺; synergistic effect with neuronal ArchT inhibition; pre-seizure activation more effective than post-onset
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42663-0.comments: Sophisticated computational model highlights Na⁺/K⁺-ATPase as the dominant anti-convulsant mechanism, with important implications for glia-targeted therapies.

model_io.model: Three-compartment computational model (neurons, astrocytes, extracellular space)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Astrocytic Na⁺/K⁺-ATPase activation is the dominant mechanism for seizure suppression
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; effect persists even when astrocytic Ca²⁺ signaling or Kir4.1 is impaired

hypotheses.hypothesis: Pre-seizure astrocyte activation is more effective than post-onset stimulation
hypotheses.result: Confirmed

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43877-y.task: Investigate combined effects of low-level laser therapy and α-lipoic acid on macrophage immunomodulation via biomaterial
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43877-y.key_results: PCL-LA membrane increased macrophage viability, reduced AK/NO/TNF-α; combined LLLT+LA further increased viability, decreased MCP-1, modified pro-MMP-9 and MMP-2/9 activity
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43877-y.comments: Demonstrates proof-of-concept for immunomodulatory biomaterial-based therapy, though clinical relevance to tissue repair requires further validation.

model_io.model: RAW 264.7 macrophages on PCL and PCL-LA membranes

hypotheses.hypothesis: Combined LLLT and LA modulate resting macrophage activity to promote tissue repair
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; synergistic effects on viability and MMP activity

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44176-2.task: Investigate CYFIP2 R87C variant impact on neuronal morphology and development
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44176-2.key_results: R87C variant reduces NPC motility and alters lamellipodia; organoids show decreased CYFIP2, increased size, and progenitor depletion by day 30; 2D and 3D models diverge significantly
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44176-2.comments: Important demonstration that 3D organoid models reveal neurodevelopmental abnormalities invisible in 2D cultures, critical for epilepsy mechanism studies.

model_io.model: CRISPR-edited hPSCs differentiated to NPCs and cortical neurons

hypotheses.hypothesis: CYFIP2 R87C impairs NPC cytoskeletal dynamics and cortical development
hypotheses.result: Confirmed in 3D organoids (not in 2D monolayers)

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44451-2.task: Identify propionate metabolism dysregulation as non-genetic mechanism of NSCLC drug resistance
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44451-2.key_results: Propionate metabolism dysregulated in NSCLC patients and drug-tolerant persisters; MMA elevated in tumors and metastatic serum; MMAB downregulation causes MMA accumulation and EMT; restoring MMAB suppresses EMT and enhances targeted therapy
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44451-2.comments: Reveals metabolic basis for non-genetic drug resistance; propionate pathway represents attractive targetable node for therapy sensitization.

model_io.model: NSCLC cell lines and drug-tolerant persister cells

hypotheses.hypothesis: MMAB downregulation dysregulates propionate metabolism, accumulates MMA, and activates EMT driving drug resistance
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; restoring MMAB reverses resistance and suppresses TGFβ signaling

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44463-y.task: Inhibit glucocorticoid-induced osteoporosis via VEGFR2/PI3K/AKT pathway
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44463-y.key_results: 5-HMF enhanced VEGFR2 phosphorylation and activated PI3K/AKT pathway; inhibited dexamethasone-induced apoptosis by regulating Bax/Bcl-2
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44463-y.comments: Strong mechanistic validation with AKT inhibitor confirmation, though clinical translation remains unclear.

hypotheses.hypothesis: 5-HMF protects osteoblasts through VEGFR2/PI3K/AKT pathway activation
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; AKT inhibitor MK2206 abrogated protective effects

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44537-x.task: Elucidate PTP4A3 role in diabetic retinopathy via endothelial dysfunction
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44537-x.key_results: PTP4A3 elevated in diabetic retinopathy; overexpression increases endothelial proliferation/migration and decreases barrier function; PTP4A3 inhibition ameliorates vascular leakage and neovascularization via PI3K-AKT pathway
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44537-x.comments: Identifies PTP4A3 as a druggable target in DR, though mechanistic details on substrate specificity remain limited.

nature:10.1038/s44333-026-00088-2.key_results: Conceptual proposal for humanoid robots to complement autonomous shuttles, restoring passenger assistance roles and safety functions

nature:10.1038/s41586-026-10220-4.task: Elucidate how climbing fibres enhance Purkinje cell calcium signals despite exciting inhibitory interneurons
nature:10.1038/s41586-026-10220-4.key_results: Climbing fibres preferentially excite MLI2s (disinhibitory interneurons) over MLI1s (inhibitory interneurons) through larger synaptic contacts and glutamate spillover; CF synchrony suppresses MLI1s and elevates PC dendritic calcium signals necessary for long-term depression
nature:10.1038/s41586-026-10220-4.comments: The disinhibitory circuit mechanism elegantly explains how a single input type (CF) can both suppress one interneuron population and enhance plasticity-related calcium signals in target neurons.

hypotheses.hypothesis: CFs preferentially excite MLI2s through larger synaptic contacts and glutamate spillover
hypotheses.result: Serial EM and slice experiments confirmed CF-MLI2 contacts have larger areas; CFs preferentially excite MLI2s via glutamate spillover

hypotheses.hypothesis: CF synchrony shifts the balance toward MLI1 suppression and elevates PC calcium signals

nature:10.1038/s41586-026-10226-y.task: Identify gene regulatory mechanisms underlying mammalian neocortical evolution and layered excitatory neuron diversity
nature:10.1038/s41586-026-10226-y.key_results: ZBTB18 transcription factor binds mammalian-specific cis-regulatory elements controlling intratelencephalic and extratelencephalic excitatory neuron subtypes; Zbtb18 deletion reduces molecular diversity and cortico-spinal/callosal projections while increasing prefrontal-directed association projections
nature:10.1038/s41586-026-10226-y.comments: The identification of ZBTB18 as a conserved regulatory node in mammalian neocortical evolution is compelling, though functional validation in non-mammalian species would strengthen claims about evolutionary divergence.

outputs: altered projection patterns (reduced callosal/cortico-spinal, increased prefrontal association)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Mammalian-specific ZBTB18-bound CREs regulate genes defining ExN subtype identity and connectivity
hypotheses.result: Cross-species comparison identified mammalian-specific ZBTB18 CREs associated with intratelencephalic/extratelencephalic subtype genes and connectivity; motifs enriched in callosal-projecting CREs with mammalian-specific conservation

hypotheses.hypothesis: ZBTB18 is necessary for proper neocortical layering and projection organization
hypotheses.result: Zbtb18 deletion dysregulated target genes, reduced diversity, and altered projections to resemble non-mammalian brain organization

nature:10.1038/s41535-026-00870-y.task: Strain-tuned ferroelectric Pca₂₁ phase transition in HfO₂ via X₂⁻ mode instability
nature:10.1038/s41535-026-00870-y.key_results: Tensile strain enhances X₂⁻ displacement and triggers polar/antipolar mode instabilities; X₂⁻ coupling with other distortions drives Landau coefficients negative, controlling transition pathway; mechanism enables Pca₂₁ stabilization via substrate strain engineering
nature:10.1038/s41535-026-00870-y.comments: Paradigm shift from primary to coupled-mode mechanism for HfO₂ ferroelectricity provides rational design principle for polycrystalline film phase control.

nature:10.1038/s43246-026-01139-4.task: Jahn-Teller phonon collapse and electron-phonon coupling in manganites La₁₋ₓSrₓMnO₃
nature:10.1038/s43246-026-01139-4.key_results: Jahn-Teller optical phonons collapse above Curie temperature despite weak magnetoresistance; neutrons confirm ferromagnetic phase conventional; giant EPC in charge/orbital channel; magnetoresistance correlates with oxygen sublattice diffusion rate, not EPC strength
