hypotheses.hypothesis: Fingerprint-like microstructure enables slip detection across all surface conditions
hypotheses.result: Detects slippage on oil/water surfaces and captures high-speed geometric microtextures

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41158-2.task: Optimize solar-assisted LiBr/H₂O ejector–absorption refrigeration with triple-layer thermal storage
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41158-2.key_results: Ejector integration enhances COP by 12.7% and exergy efficiency by 11.3%; reduces investment cost 9%; achieves COP 0.74 and solar COP 0.58 at 973 W/m²
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41158-2.comments: Combines thermodynamic and thermoeconomic optimization; demonstrates practical path for sustainable electricity-independent cooling.

model_io.model: Solar-assisted single-effect absorption cycle with ejector and triple-layer thermal storage

hypotheses.hypothesis: Ejector integration recovers energy and reduces irreversibility in absorption cycle
hypotheses.result: 12.7% COP improvement and 11.3% exergy gain versus baseline

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43775-3.task: Implement spiral phase-contrast imaging of infrared objects using undetected visible photons
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43775-3.key_results: Fourier filtering applied to visible beam enables omnidirectional edge enhancement of infrared object images
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43775-3.comments: Extends induced-coherence undetected photon imaging to complex Fourier filtering; generalizes to other microscopy modes.

model_io.model: Nonlinear interferometer with induced coherence between downconverted photon pairs
inputs: spiral phase mask on visible SLM
outputs: visible-detected image with infrared edge enhancement

hypotheses.hypothesis: Induced coherence permits Fourier component manipulation via phase masks on visible beam
hypotheses.result: Spiral phase-contrast imaging achieved with only visible photon detection

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44547-9.task: Optimize liquid fodder homogenizer-disperser for pigs
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44547-9.key_results: Optimal operation time 45.1–50.4 min minimizes stratification (id < 5%) and energy consumption; soybean shows lowest specific energy consumption (0.696 MJ/kg)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44547-9.comments: Engineering optimization of agricultural equipment; results are highly dependent on input material type.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Operation time and inlet geometry control particle dispersion and energy efficiency
hypotheses.result: Optimal time ~45–50 min for minimal stratification and energy across multiple crop types

hf:2603.12789.task: Multi-person multi-view 3D human and scene reconstruction from video
hf:2603.12789.key_results: Competitive performance on EMDB, RICH, EgoHumans, and EgoExo4D; 8x faster than optimization-based multi-view approaches
hf:2603.12789.comments: Unified single-pass framework avoiding external modules is elegant, though scale adjustment module suggests fundamental challenges in multi-scale reasoning remain.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Geometry-based multi-person association is more robust than appearance-based methods
hypotheses.result: Confirmed through evaluation on multi-person datasets

hypotheses.hypothesis: Scale adjustment module can resolve discrepancies between human and scene scales
hypotheses.result: Demonstrated effectiveness on benchmarks with varying human-scene scale ratios

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70840-2.task: Determine how lipid membrane interfaces promote α-Synuclein phase separation and aggregation
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70840-2.key_results: α-Synuclein condenses at sub-critical concentrations (~10 nM) on specific lipid stoichiometries; condensates nucleate fibrils and trigger membrane deformation; membrane depolarization alters puncta size/number and releases protein from neurons
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70840-2.comments: The prewetting-like transition model elegantly explains how interfacial potential drives condensation below bulk saturation, with direct relevance to PD pathogenesis mechanisms.

model_io.model: In vitro lipid bilayer + α-Synuclein reconstitution

hypotheses.hypothesis: Lipid membrane interfacial potential drives local phase separation of α-Synuclein below bulk saturation concentration
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; prewetting-like transition observed with specific lipid stoichiometries

hypotheses.hypothesis: Condensates serve as nucleation sites for fibril formation
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; fibrils form from membrane-localized condensates causing membrane damage

nature:10.1038/s41596-026-01334-0.task: Develop and describe residue interaction network (RIN) analysis for protein structure interpretation
nature:10.1038/s41596-026-01334-0.key_results: RING software condenses structural data into noncovalent interaction subsets enabling rapid biological insight; complete workflow executable in <45 min for single and multi-state protein analyses
nature:10.1038/s41596-026-01334-0.comments: This is a protocol paper providing practical guidance rather than novel mechanistic insights; useful for streamlining structure analysis but limited in experimental innovation.

nature:10.1038/s41523-026-00929-w.task: Elucidate POU1F1-mediated cancer stem cell induction in breast cancer
nature:10.1038/s41523-026-00929-w.key_results: POU1F1 overexpression increased ALDH+ cells and enhanced mammosphere formation; IL-6/JAK2/STAT3 inhibitors decreased ALDH expression and colony formation
nature:10.1038/s41523-026-00929-w.comments: The mechanistic link between POU1F1 and IL-6/JAK2/STAT3 activation is demonstrated but the direct transcriptional targets remain incompletely characterized.

model_io.model: POU1F1-overexpressing and knockdown MCF-7 breast cancer cells

hypotheses.hypothesis: POU1F1 induces BCSC phenotype via IL-6/JAK2/STAT3 pathway activation
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: JAK inhibitors and anti-IL-6R antibodies reduced ALDH expression and mammosphere formation

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41470-x.task: Evaluate Tamarindus indica phytochemicals as COMT inhibitors for Parkinson's disease
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41470-x.key_results: Gallacetophenone identified from 170 phytochemicals as promising COMT inhibitor; enhanced conformational stability in MD simulations; favorable drug-likeness properties
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41470-x.comments: Natural product screening reduces hepatotoxicity risk but computational prediction requires in vitro/in vivo validation.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Plant-derived COMT inhibitors provide safer alternatives to synthetic inhibitors
hypotheses.result: Gallacetophenone demonstrated stable COMT binding, enhanced conformational stability, and favorable pharmacokinetic properties in silico

hf:2603.11535.task: Dynamic computation allocation in mixture-of-experts routing for language models
hf:2603.11535.key_results: 0.067 lower cross-entropy loss than TC-MoE; equivalent performance with 1.6× fewer tokens on 2.4B parameter model
hf:2603.11535.comments: The fully causal, token-independent routing mechanism is elegant and well-motivated for autoregressive settings, though the practical speedup gains depend on how efficiently threshold-based routing can be implemented.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Dynamic routing with EMA-based thresholds can achieve load balance without auxiliary losses
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; ET maintains load balance while reducing auxiliary loss dependency

hypotheses.hypothesis: Fully causal token routing improves autoregressive language modeling efficiency
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; achieved better cross-entropy loss and token efficiency than TC-MoE

hf:2603.14482.task: Self-supervised dense visual representation learning for images and videos
hf:2603.14482.key_results: 7.71 mAP on Ego4D object-interaction anticipation; 40.8 Recall@5 on EPIC-KITCHENS action anticipation; 20-point improvement in robot grasping success over V-JEPA-2 AC
hf:2603.14482.comments: The hierarchical self-supervision and dense masking-based objectives effectively couple spatial and temporal grounding, though the method's computational cost during training is not discussed.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Dense predictive loss with both visible and masked token contributions improves spatial and temporal grounding
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; strong performance on interaction and action anticipation benchmarks

hypotheses.hypothesis: Deep hierarchical self-supervision across encoder layers improves representation quality
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; state-of-the-art results across multiple downstream tasks

hypotheses.hypothesis: Multi-modal tokenizers enable unified image and video representation learning
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; strong scaling and performance gains over single-modality approaches

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70722-7.task: Resolve cryo-EM structure of TRPM1 and determine ion channel architecture
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70722-7.key_results: TRPM1 adopts canonical tetrameric intracellular domain; transmembrane domain has inverted handedness (opposite to related TRPM channels) with domain-swapped voltage sensor and pore domains forming large pore structure
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70722-7.comments: Non-canonical architecture explains unique pharmacology and resolves controversy about TRPM1 ion channel function, though functional validation of permeation properties is needed.

hypotheses.hypothesis: TRPM1 functions as an ion channel despite sequence similarity to TRPM3
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; canonical tetrameric fold and pore-like structure support ion channel function

hypotheses.hypothesis: Inverted transmembrane domain confers unique permeation properties
hypotheses.result: Supported; large pore structure and non-canonical architecture suggest distinct pharmacological traits

nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08558-8.task: Elucidate ZDHHC9-mediated palmitoylation of LAMTOR1 in mTOR signaling activation
nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08558-8.key_results: ZDHHC9 palmitoylates LAMTOR1 at Cys3/4 residues, enhancing mTORC1 recruitment and accelerating RCC progression
nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08558-8.comments: Identifies a specific palmitoylation event as a mechanistic driver of cancer progression, with potential therapeutic implications.

hypotheses.hypothesis: ZDHHC9 palmitoylation of LAMTOR1 enhances mTORC1 recruitment
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: palmitoylation at Cys3/4 increases mTORC1 localization and signaling

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70752-1.task: Determine PLA2G6 function in MAM-mediated Ca²⁺ transfer and Parkinson's disease pathogenesis
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70752-1.key_results: PLA2G6 stabilizes IP3R1-GRP75-VDAC1 complex; loss causes IP3R1 degradation, reduced ER-mitochondria contacts, and impaired Ca²⁺ transfer
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70752-1.comments: Provides mechanistic insight into PD pathophysiology through organellar dysfunction and suggests MAM remodeling as a therapeutic target.

model_io.model: Patient-derived dopaminergic neurons (iPSCs), in vitro MAM assays

hypotheses.hypothesis: PLA2G6 loss destabilizes IP3R1-GRP75-VDAC1 complex
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: PLA2G6 deficiency accelerates IP3R1 degradation and disrupts MAM structure

hypotheses.hypothesis: MAM linker can rescue PLA2G6 loss phenotypes
hypotheses.result: Confirmed in patient-derived neurons

nature:10.1038/s41580-026-00957-1.task: Review technologies for measuring and modulating protein subcellular localization
nature:10.1038/s41580-026-00957-1.key_results: Comprehensive assessment of microscopy, mass spectrometry-based correlation profiling, proximity labelling (measuring localization); localization tags, bifunctional molecules (manipulating localization); evaluation of strengths/weaknesses for contextualizing multilocalizing/multifunctional proteins
nature:10.1038/s41580-026-00957-1.comments: Timely review addressing critical gap in spatial proteomics; emphasizes importance of spatial context for protein function interpretation.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41545-9.task: Establish glutamine-mediated wound healing mechanism via MEK/ERK/SLC1A5 pathway and M2 macrophage polarization
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41545-9.key_results: Glutamine activates MEK/ERK, upregulating SLC1A5; promotes glutamine metabolic reprogramming, M2 macrophage polarization, angiogenesis (CD31+), and fibroblast activation (α-SMA+); inhibitors of MEK/GLS1/SLC1A5 block effects
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41545-9.comments: Identifies metabolite-dependent macrophage polarization as rate-limiting step in wound healing; suggests therapeutic targeting of glutamine metabolism.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Glutamine promotes wound healing via MEK/ERK/SLC1A5-dependent M2 polarization
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: inhibitors of MEK, GLS1, or SLC1A5 block glutamine-mediated angiogenesis and macrophage polarization

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70637-3.task: Evaluating digital breast tomosynthesis AI model subgroup performance for cancer detection
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70637-3.key_results: Overall AUROC 0.91, sensitivity 0.73; in-situ cancers (AUROC 0.85, sens 0.55), calcifications (0.80, 0.66), dense tissue (0.88, 0.63) lower; masses (0.93, 0.85), architectural distortion (0.90, 0.83) higher
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70637-3.comments: Granular subgroup evaluation reveals critical performance disparities; dense breast tissue and calcifications warrant model refinement.

inputs: 167,860 DBT screening exams (1,368 screen-detected cancers, 166,387 negative)
outputs: AUROC/sensitivity stratified by demographic, imaging, pathologic features

hypotheses.hypothesis: AI performance varies substantially across cancer morphologies and breast tissue types
hypotheses.result: In-situ cancers and dense tissue are challenging; masses and architectural distortions well-detected

nature:10.1038/s41598-024-84792-4.task: Immunoinformatics design of multi-epitope lung cancer vaccine targeting pyroptosis-associated antigens
nature:10.1038/s41598-024-84792-4.key_results: Vaccine achieves high antigenicity and solubility; strong TLR2/4/5/3/7/8 binding; 100 ns MD simulations confirm stability; codon optimization enables E. coli expression
nature:10.1038/s41598-024-84792-4.comments: Comprehensive in silico design but entirely computational; immunogenicity claims require functional validation in vitro and in vivo.

model_io.model: Epitope prediction, molecular docking, MD simulation, immune simulation, codon optimization

hypotheses.hypothesis: Multi-epitope vaccine targeting pyroptosis antigens activates innate and adaptive immunity
hypotheses.result: Computational predictions show strong immunogenic responses with stable vaccine structure

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-39287-9.task: Predicting heat stress response in dairy cows from milk mid-infrared spectra
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-39287-9.key_results: Body temperature prediction equation R²=0.67 (RMSE=0.64°C); three-class heat stress classification accuracy 61%; multiparous early-lactation cows most affected
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-39287-9.comments: Non-invasive MIR-based phenotyping is practical; moderate classification accuracy suggests multivariate confounding.

model_io.model: MIR spectral prediction models + mixed effects analysis

hypotheses.hypothesis: Milk MIR spectral profiles reflect individual heat stress response
hypotheses.result: Moderate predictive accuracy for temperature and heat stress class; genetic/physiologic factors identified

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40783-1.task: Protein language model-based E. coli O-serotype classification
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40783-1.key_results: 93% accuracy with 9 ML-prioritized marker genes; outperforms sequence similarity tools; high recall for rare serotypes
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40783-1.comments: Strong performance on underrepresented serotypes is clinically relevant; generalizability to divergent strains promising.

model_io.model: ESM-2 protein language model with Random Forest classifier
inputs: E. coli protein sequences (wcaM, wcaL, wcaK, wzzE, wzxC, wecC, glmM, garR, hisD)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Protein language model embeddings improve serotype generalization vs. sequence similarity
hypotheses.result: 93% accuracy with better recall for low-frequency and divergent serotypes

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43871-4.task: Characterizing LtmA-mediated repression of cholesterol transport in Mycobacterium
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43871-4.key_results: LtmA acts as repressor of mce4 operon; reduces cholesterol uptake and intracellular survival in macrophages
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43871-4.comments: Functional characterization of regulatory mechanism in model organism; translational relevance to TB pathogenesis inference required.

model_io.model: EMSA, transcriptional knockdown/overexpression, macrophage infection assays

hypotheses.hypothesis: LtmA represses mce4 operon cholesterol transport function
hypotheses.result: ltmA knockdown increased mce4 expression and macrophage survival; overexpression decreased both

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44413-8.task: Medical image segmentation via dual-branch attention network with split convolution and transformers
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44413-8.key_results: D3T-Net surpasses contemporary benchmarks in liver and lesion segmentation; dual CNN-Transformer branches capture local and global features; cross-attention mechanism improves boundary retention
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44413-8.comments: Architectural innovation combining CNNs and transformers is sound; evaluation on liver only; multi-organ validation would strengthen claims.

model_io.model: D3T-Net: parallel CNN (deep split module) + Transformer (multi-dimensional) branches with direction-aware interaction attention

hypotheses.hypothesis: Dual-branch fusion of CNN local features and Transformer global context improves segmentation
hypotheses.result: Surpassed benchmarks; enhanced boundary retention for small objects via multi-scale skip connections

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-45113-z.task: Identifying miRNA regulation of drug-metabolizing enzymes in human liver
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-45113-z.key_results: 22 unique miRNAs detected regulating CYP450/UGT genes; significant negative correlations observed for CYP2C8/2C9/3A4, UGT1A1/1A3/2B15; miR-200a-3p directly targets UGT1A3
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-45113-z.comments: Comprehensive prediction + experimental validation for two miRNA-target pairs; remaining pairs require functional validation.

model_io.model: miRNA prediction tools + qPCR arrays + targeted proteomics + reporter assays

hypotheses.hypothesis: miRNAs post-transcriptionally regulate drug-metabolizing enzymes
hypotheses.result: Direct validation of miR-200a-3p → UGT1A3; miR-655-3p → CYP2C8 interaction inconclusive

nature:10.1038/s41698-026-01335-y.task: Predicting PAM50/PSC molecular subtypes from H&E histology using vision transformers
nature:10.1038/s41698-026-01335-y.key_results: UNIv2-MIL achieves AUC 0.863 (PAM50) and 0.81 (PSC); luminal predictions correlate with hormone therapy response (p<0.03); luminal B/proliferating scores correlate with adverse pathologic features (p<0.001/0.003)
nature:10.1038/s41698-026-01335-y.comments: Histopathology-to-molecular prediction is clinically appealing; external validation cohorts strengthen claims but prospective testing required.

model_io.model: UNIv2-MIL (pathology foundation model + multiple instance learning)
inputs: H&E-stained biopsy slides (903 slides from 424 patients with molecular data)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Histomorphology encodes molecular subtype information predictive of treatment response
hypotheses.result: Predicted luminal subtypes correlated with HT responsiveness and APF risk

nature:10.1038/s41698-026-01356-7.task: Predicting drug response in metastatic colorectal cancer via personalized functional profiling of spheroids
nature:10.1038/s41698-026-01356-7.key_results: PDS mirrored histopathology and genetics; anti-EGFR screening distinguished responders from non-responders; complementarity with genomics demonstrated
nature:10.1038/s41698-026-01356-7.comments: 3D ex vivo model is more physiologically relevant than 2D; partial concordance with clinical outcomes suggests need for protocol refinement.

model_io.model: Patient-derived spheroid (PDS) screening with drug libraries

hypotheses.hypothesis: Ex vivo PDS drug screening predicts clinical treatment response
hypotheses.result: Anti-EGFR and anti-ERBB2 sensitivity distinguished responsive patients; SOC screening partially correlated with outcomes

nature:10.1038/s41746-026-02548-y.task: Unified denoising for multi-organ accelerated MRI via deep learning
nature:10.1038/s41746-026-02548-y.key_results: Model trained on 148,930 noisy-clean pairs from 6 centers, 4 vendors, 6 organs, 96 protocols; 7.05% Dice improvement in downstream segmentation; 3× acceleration with diagnostic equivalence to clean images
nature:10.1038/s41746-026-02548-y.comments: Large-scale real-world dataset and multi-vendor validation are excellent; clinical deployment requires vendor-specific recalibration and regulatory clearance.

inputs: accelerated MRI reconstructions from commercial systems (148,930 image pairs)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Deep learning denoising restores diagnostic image quality in accelerated multi-organ MRI
hypotheses.result: Outperformed state-of-the-art; 7.05% segmentation Dice improvement; 3× acceleration maintains diagnostic equivalence

nature:10.1038/s41598-025-31668-w.task: Blockchain-based residential demand side management with peer-to-peer energy trading
nature:10.1038/s41598-025-31668-w.key_results: Two-layer hybrid architecture (EnPlus server + Ethereum blockchain) reduces energy costs via P2P trading with GER tokens; improved peak-to-average ratio on 52-prosumer case study
nature:10.1038/s41598-025-31668-w.comments: Practical system design integrating Firefly Algorithm scheduling and cryptographic security; transaction latency acknowledged as limitation of hybrid model.

model_io.model: EnPlus server + private Ethereum blockchain with Solidity smart contracts + Firefly Optimization

hypotheses.hypothesis: P2P trading with blockchain improves financial savings and local energy independence
hypotheses.result: Confirmed on 52-prosumer Kolkata case; minor transaction delays from hybrid processing

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43252-x.task: Secure multimodal biometric authentication with trust-adaptive fusion
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43252-x.key_results: Equal Error Rate 0.0038 on fused CASIA-Face/Fingerprint features; MobileNet + trust-adaptive fusion + CKKS homomorphic encryption; Grad-CAM interpretability provided
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43252-x.comments: Solid integration of deep learning, privacy-preserving encryption, and explainability; practical deployment feasibility depends on cryptographic overhead.

model_io.model: MobileNet feature extractor + Trust Adaptive Fusion + CKKS homomorphic encryption + Grad-CAM

hypotheses.hypothesis: Trust-adaptive fusion improves robustness against noisy modality inputs vs. static fusion
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; EER 0.0038 demonstrates high accuracy on biometric datasets

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43851-8.task: Service-oriented vulnerability assessment for high-speed rail network under disruptions
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43851-8.key_results: Three-layer bipartite coupled network captures passenger-train-track interactions; HSR network exhibits low structural vulnerability but high service capacity vulnerability under full load
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43851-8.comments: Service-centric perspective improves realism vs. topological-only analysis; transfer strategies and demand evaluation method are novel but lack sensitivity analysis.

model_io.model: Three-layer coupled network (passenger demand, train service, track infrastructure) with transfer strategy simulation

hypotheses.hypothesis: Service-oriented vulnerability assessment reveals degradation risk missed by topological analysis alone
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; lines with high demand/long transfers show high vulnerability under full-load disruptions

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44718-8.task: Fractional-order coupled damped oscillator and non-Fickian heat conduction model
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44718-8.key_results: Existence/uniqueness proven via Banach fixed-point; Hopf bifurcation criteria derived; fractional model (α=0.9, β=0.5) preserves memory effects and slower decay vs. integer-order
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44718-8.comments: Rigorous mathematical framework with numerical validation; practical relevance to nanohybrid materials demonstrated but only via simulations.

model_io.model: Fractional-order coupled PDE system with time delay and energy-based stability analysis

hypotheses.hypothesis: Fractional derivatives capture memory effects in viscoelastic nanofiller interactions better than integer-order models
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; fractional model exhibits slower decay and enhanced memory properties

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44816-7.task: Linear stability analysis of MHD channel flow with Navier slip and porous medium
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44816-7.key_results: Symmetric slip destabilizes flow (20–30% wall shear stress decrease); porous resistance and asymmetric slip enhance stability; magnetic field partially recovers shear (10–15% increase)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44816-7.comments: Comprehensive spectral analysis with practical implications for microfluidics and MHD energy systems; findings are robust but engineering design guidance is qualitative.

model_io.model: Brinkman-Navier-Stokes with modified Orr-Sommerfeld equation solved via Chebyshev spectral collocation

hypotheses.hypothesis: Magnetic damping and porous drag counteract destabilizing effects of wall slip
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; magnetic field and porosity partially restore wall shear stress

nature:10.1038/s41427-026-00639-6.task: Understanding asymmetric doping effects on quantum criticality in heavy-fermion compound CeRhIn5
nature:10.1038/s41427-026-00639-6.key_results: 5% Hg doping suppresses superconductivity and stabilizes SDW-type AFM phases vs. Kondo-breakdown QCP in lightly doped case; hole-doping nucleates localized magnetic droplets
nature:10.1038/s41427-026-00639-6.comments: Reveals mechanistic doping asymmetry via local electronic structure modifications; highlights interplay of magnetism and Kondo screening in phase evolution.

model_io.model: Pressure-dependent transport measurements on CeRhIn5 with varying dopants

hypotheses.hypothesis: Electron and hole doping produce qualitatively different electronic structure changes affecting QCP type
hypotheses.result: Heavy hole doping stabilizes SDW-type QCP while suppressing superconductivity

nature:10.1038/s41524-026-02029-6.task: Discovery of half-metallic 2D Cr2Se3 monolayer from Se-deficient antiferromagnetic CrSe2 with engineered high Curie temperature
nature:10.1038/s41524-026-02029-6.key_results: Cr2Se3 exhibits half-metallicity with 1.39 eV (H) and 2.28 eV (T) spin-down band gaps; Curie temperatures 547 K (H) and 606 K (T); T-phase Stoner criterion satisfied under 2-4% strain
nature:10.1038/s41524-026-02029-6.comments: First-principles prediction of promising 2D magnet; high Tc values suggest practical utility in spintronic devices at accessible temperatures.

model_io.model: DFT calculations (GGA+U) on CrSe2 and defect-engineered Cr2Se3

hypotheses.hypothesis: 25% Se vacancies transform antiferromagnetic CrSe2 into half-metallic ferromagnetic Cr2Se3
hypotheses.result: Both H and T phases exhibit half-metallicity and high Tc values

nature:10.1038/s41540-026-00688-1.task: High-throughput phenotyping of peanut pod geometry via manifold learning for cultivar discrimination and crop breeding
nature:10.1038/s41540-026-00688-1.key_results: 6500+ pods analyzed; geographically distinct morphological signatures identified; accurate cultivar discrimination achieved; scalable framework enables Large Geometric Model development
nature:10.1038/s41540-026-00688-1.comments: Innovative application of manifold learning to agricultural phenotyping; demonstrates potential to bridge gap between genomics and breeding decisions.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Manifold learning captures pod geometry sufficient for cultivar and geographic discrimination
hypotheses.result: Achieved high accuracy on cultivar discrimination and identified geographic signatures

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44684-1.task: Natural convection heat transfer optimization for passive cooling via fin material and geometry variation
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44684-1.key_results: Copper V-fin config achieved max heat transfer coefficient 47.66 W/m²K at 150W (30-40% enhancement); surface temperature reduction 15-20%; uncertainty ±6-8%
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44684-1.comments: Well-executed experimental study with rigorous uncertainty analysis; practical guidance for heat sink design though limited to passive convection regime.

model_io.model: Heated vertical aluminum plate with variable fin configurations

hypotheses.hypothesis: Copper V-fins maximize heat transfer through combined material conductivity and geometric optimization
hypotheses.result: Achieved highest heat transfer coefficient and temperature reduction

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44770-4.task: Optimization of ultrasonic crystal removal in tunnel drainage pipelines via frequency and geometry tuning
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44770-4.key_results: 40 kHz optimal frequency; straight installation achieves 98% removal in closest sections vs. <45% in distant sections; 45-50 min optimal operating time
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44770-4.comments: Practical engineering solution combining COMSOL FEA and experimental validation; spatial dependence of removal efficiency is a significant design constraint.

model_io.model: COMSOL sound-pressure field simulation + lab crystallization-removal experiment

hypotheses.hypothesis: 40 kHz provides optimal acoustic conditions in corrugated pipe geometry
hypotheses.result: Achieved highest and most uniform removal performance vs. other frequencies

nature:10.1038/s42005-026-02583-x.task: Deriving finite sufficient conditions for catalytic state transformations in quantum information
nature:10.1038/s42005-026-02583-x.key_results: Finite set of inequalities derived via polynomial ℓp-norm representation; software toolbox provided for checking catalysis feasibility
nature:10.1038/s42005-026-02583-x.comments: Resolves computational intractability of checking infinite inequality sets; extends majorization framework to thermal operations.

model_io.model: Mathematical framework connecting ℓp norms and Rényi entropies

hypotheses.hypothesis: Polynomial representation of ℓp norms enables finite characterization of catalytic transformations
hypotheses.result: Successfully derived finite sufficient condition set

nature:10.1038/s42254-026-00925-w.task: Review of sphere packing physics across dimensions for ordered and disordered systems
nature:10.1038/s42254-026-00925-w.key_results: Comprehensive survey of three decades of sphere packing developments; connections to equilibrium/nonequilibrium phase properties
nature:10.1038/s42254-026-00925-w.comments: Foundational review article synthesizing diverse mathematical and physical insights; limited quantitative results as surveys typically do.

hf:2603.19235.task: 3D scene understanding and spatial reasoning for MLLMs
hf:2603.19235.key_results: Outperforms state-of-the-art on 3D scene understanding, spatial reasoning, and embodied manipulation benchmarks without explicit 3D supervision
hf:2603.19235.comments: Clever repurposing of video diffusion models' implicit spatial priors; demonstrates that generative models learn robust physical priors as a byproduct of temporal coherence.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Video generation models learn implicit 3D structural priors from temporal coherence
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; extracted spatiotemporal features improve MLLM spatial reasoning

hf:2603.19228.task: Instruction-guided video editing with semantic-motion factorization
hf:2603.19228.key_results: Achieves state-of-the-art among open-source and competitive with commercial systems; factorized pre-training alone yields strong zero-shot editing
hf:2603.19228.comments: The factorization paradigm elegantly separates semantic understanding from temporal dynamics, avoiding explicit external priors that limit generalization.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Decoupling semantic anchoring and motion modeling improves editing quality
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; zero-shot ability validates the factorization approach

hf:2603.19199.task: Real-time vision-language-action inference with low latency
hf:2603.19199.key_results: Compresses immediate reaction denoising tenfold into single step; enables real-time robotics on consumer GPUs with table-tennis task validation
hf:2603.19199.comments: Addresses a practical bottleneck in VLA deployment; Horizon-Aware Schedule is elegant but relies on action chunking assumptions.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Constant sampling schedules are inefficient for reaction latency in flow-based VLAs
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; adaptive prioritization of near-term actions reduces reaction latency

hf:2603.18524.key_results: Achieves view-consistent video generation of customized 3D subjects via 1-frame optimization; enables multi-view adaptation without exhaustive video training
hf:2603.18524.comments: Novel insight that single-frame optimization with geometric conditioning can avoid temporal overfitting; asymmetrical multi-view strategy is well-motivated.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Restricting spatial updates in 1-frame optimization prevents temporal overfitting
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; robust 3D priors learned without multi-view video data

hf:2603.19227.task: Human motion generation with semantic and kinematic control
hf:2603.19227.key_results: Reduces trajectory error from 0.72 to 0.08 cm and FID from 0.083 to 0.029 on HumanML3D using one-sixth of tokens; improves under stronger constraints
hf:2603.19227.comments: Bridging discrete tokens and continuous diffusion is elegant; the three-stage framework cleanly separates concerns.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Delegating motion recovery to diffusion decoder enables compact tokens
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; single-layer tokens preserve fidelity with 83% token reduction

hf:2603.19231.key_results: State-of-the-art on PartNet-Mobility in reconstruction accuracy and inference speed; generalizes to robotic manipulation and articulated scenes
hf:2603.19231.comments: Progressive structural reasoning avoids direct articulation regression; missing quantitative results and comparison metrics in abstract.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Progressive transformation into canonical geometry enables stable articulation inference
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; outperforms multi-view and retrieval-based baselines

hf:2603.19217.task: Evaluating omnimodal LLMs on long-form audio-video understanding
hf:2603.19217.key_results: Gemini 3 Pro achieves ~65% accuracy; open-source models <35%; reveals challenges in long-term memory, temporal localization, and multimodal perception
hf:2603.19217.comments: Critical gap identified between short-clip and real-world long-form video; benchmark is valuable but shows existing models are far from production-ready.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Current OmniLLMs struggle with long-form audio-visual understanding
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; significant accuracy gaps across all tested models

hf:2603.19232.task: Discrete visual generation on high-dimensional representation tokens
hf:2603.19232.key_results: First discrete generation model for high-dimensional (768-1024 dim) tokens; state-of-the-art on ImageNet-256 with strong scaling (900M to 3.7B); validates discretized tokens preserve original capabilities
hf:2603.19232.comments: Enabling unified multimodal architectures via discrete high-dim tokens is ambitious; fine-grained masking approach is well-designed.

hypotheses.hypothesis: High-dimensional discrete tokens can preserve representation capabilities for both understanding and generation
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; same tokens effective for dual tasks

hf:2603.18743.task: Continual agent self-improvement via skill design
hf:2603.18743.key_results: 26.2% and 116.2% relative accuracy improvements on General AI Assistants and Humanity's Last Exam; agent autonomously designs agents for new tasks
hf:2603.18743.comments: Memory-based RL with externalised skills enables parameter-free adaptation; impressive but lacks analysis of failure modes.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Agents can autonomously design task-specific agents through iterative skill refinement
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; sustained gains across benchmarks

hf:2603.19223.key_results: F2LLM-v2-14B ranks first on 11 MTEB benchmarks; smaller models achieve SOTA for resource-constrained settings; supports 200+ languages including low-resource
hf:2603.19223.comments: Matryoshka learning + pruning + distillation is effective recipe; emphasis on underserved languages is important.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Two-stage LLM-based training with matryoshka learning enables efficient multilingual embeddings
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; SOTA across diverse model sizes

hf:2603.19220.task: Post-training compact MoE LLMs with cascade RL
hf:2603.19220.key_results: Nemotron-Cascade 2 (30B MoE, 3B active) achieves Gold in IMO, IOI, ICPC with 20x fewer parameters than DeepSeekV3.2; competitive with frontier models
hf:2603.19220.comments: Multi-domain on-policy distillation during RL is clever for recovering regressions; exceptional density-to-capability ratio.

model_io.model: Nemotron-Cascade 2 (MoE with cascade RL + multi-domain distillation)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Cascade RL + multi-domain on-policy distillation sustains gains in compact MoE models
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; strong reasoning with high parameter efficiency

hf:2603.18472.task: Evaluating MLLMs on discrete symbol understanding
hf:2603.18472.key_results: Models fail at basic symbol recognition but succeed at complex reasoning; open-source models <35%, frontier models ~65-75%; reveals cognitive mismatch
hf:2603.18472.comments: Uncovers fundamental limitation: MLLMs rely on linguistic probability rather than true visual perception of symbols; important diagnostic.

hypotheses.hypothesis: MLLMs exhibit cognitive mismatch in discrete symbol understanding
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; fail basic recognition but succeed at complex reasoning

hf:2603.19224.task: Video object removal with effect erasing and consistent background synthesis
hf:2603.19224.key_results: VOR dataset: 60K paired videos, 5 effect types; EffectErase achieves superior performance in effect-aware removal via reciprocal insertion-removal learning
hf:2603.19224.comments: Dataset addresses real gap in video inpainting; treating insertion as auxiliary task is well-motivated for learning complementary behaviors.

outputs: video with object removed and background restored

hypotheses.hypothesis: Insertion as auxiliary task improves removal quality through complementary learning
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; insertion-removal consistency objective enhances effect erasing

hf:2603.15030.task: Evaluating agentic MLLMs on tool composition and visual reasoning
hf:2603.15030.key_results: Gemini-3.0-Pro achieves 51% on VTC-Bench; reveals struggles in tool generalization and multi-tool composition; 680 problems across 9-category hierarchy
hf:2603.15030.comments: Comprehensive benchmark with realistic OpenCV tools; exposes that models rely on familiar subsets rather than selecting optimal tools.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Current MLLMs struggle with generalization to diverse tool-sets and multi-tool composition
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; limited to familiar tools, inefficient planning

hf:2603.18090.task: Speech generation with token-based autoregressive modeling
hf:2603.18090.key_results: Supports zero-shot voice cloning, token-level duration control, pronunciation control, code-switching, long-form generation; two model variants for scalability vs. efficiency
hf:2603.18090.comments: Discrete audio tokens + causal tokenizer is sound recipe; variable-bitrate RVQ for semantic-acoustic coupling is well-designed.

model_io.model: MOSS-TTS (autoregressive speech generator on discrete tokens)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Causal tokenizer with variable-bitrate RVQ enables unified semantic-acoustic representation for zero-shot voice cloning
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; supports multilingual and long-form generation

hf:2603.11804.task: Domain adaptation of VLMs for remote sensing without teacher models
hf:2603.11804.key_results: OSMDA-VLM achieves SOTA on 10 benchmarks; eliminates dependency on frontier teacher models; generates annotations via OSM pairing without manual labels
hf:2603.11804.comments: Self-contained framework using OSM as annotation engine is clever and scalable; demonstrates that auxiliary geographic data replaces need for stronger teachers.

hypotheses.hypothesis: OSM-based pseudo-labeling enables domain adaptation without external teacher models
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; achieves SOTA with lower training cost

hf:2603.18815.task: Scalable rollout infrastructure for RL training of multi-turn LLM agents
hf:2603.18815.key_results: ProRL Agent enables RL training on software engineering, math, STEM, and coding; supports rootless HPC environments; rollout-as-a-service design decouples orchestration
hf:2603.18815.comments: Infrastructure contribution; clean separation of concerns (rollout vs. training) improves maintainability but limited novelty in RL itself.

model_io.model: ProRL Agent (RL infrastructure for agentic rollouts)

hf:2603.18002.task: Language-based localization and 3D reasoning with monocular video
hf:2603.18002.key_results: SOTA on language-based localization and 3D QA benchmarks; outperforms 2D and video baselines via global layout + egocentric perspective supervision
hf:2603.18002.comments: Joint objectives for layout reconstruction and situation modeling elegantly ground language in 3D; lightweight camera pose priors from foundation models is practical.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Global layout + egocentric supervision enables VLMs to reason about 3D space
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; SOTA on localization and 3D QA tasks

hf:2603.16929.task: Stable reinforcement learning with hazard-aware policy optimization
hf:2603.16929.key_results: MHPO outperforms existing methods on reasoning benchmarks (text and vision-language); Log-Fidelity Modulator enables differentiable ratio control; asymmetric hazard penalties prevent mode collapse
hf:2603.16929.comments: Survival analysis for hazard modeling is creative; addresses real instability issues in GRPO but lacks comparison with recent PPO variants.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Log-Fidelity Modulator + Decoupled Hazard Penalty improve training stability and prevent mode collapse
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; consistent gains on diverse benchmarks

hf:2603.18886.task: Mathematical reasoning with formal object derivation and test-time aggregation
hf:2603.18886.key_results: Strong LMs (Qwen3-235B, o3) struggle on Principia; on-policy judge training boosts performance; test-time aggregation scales compute; cross-format generalization to numerical/MCQA
hf:2603.18886.comments: Principia benchmark addresses real gap in formal reasoning; on-policy judge training is well-motivated but evaluation limited to few models.

hypotheses.hypothesis: On-policy judge training improves mathematical object reasoning
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; boosts performance on Principia and numerical tasks

hf:2603.17554.key_results: Works with 5% of COCO data; generalizes to 19 datasets without fine-tuning (underwater, industrial defect, remote sensing); no external prompts required
hf:2603.17554.comments: Learnable query embeddings with visual feature coupling and cascade self-prompting is effective; impressive zero-shot generalization.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Self-prompted learnable embeddings enable prompt-free object detection generalization
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; zero-shot transfer across domains

hf:2603.13045.task: Low-resource multilingual machine translation via RL with quality estimation
hf:2603.13045.key_results: WALAR improves 1400 language directions on Flores-101; outperforms LLaMAX; retains high-resource performance while elevating low-resource translation
hf:2603.13045.comments: Insight about QE model failure modes ('holes') motivating word/language alignment is practical; RL-only approach using monolingual data is resource-efficient.

model_io.model: LLM with RL (QE-based reward, word/language alignment)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Mitigating QE model holes via word/language alignment improves low-resource translation
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; large gains on 1400 Flores-101 directions

hf:2603.19234.key_results: Continuous LoD without sacrificing full-capacity quality; stochastic budget training maintains backbone performance; smooth speed-quality trade-off from single model
hf:2603.19234.comments: Clever stochastic budget training enables continuous LoD without architecture changes; useful for practical 3D applications.

model_io.model: MGS (ordered Gaussian splatting with stochastic training)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Stochastic budget training enables continuous LoD without quality degradation
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; matches full-capacity performance across budgets

hf:2603.13395.task: Faster flow matching via cluster-wise optimal transport
hf:2603.13395.key_results: COT-FM accelerates sampling and improves generation quality; straightens vector fields via cluster-wise coupling; plug-and-play across 2D, image, and robotics tasks
hf:2603.13395.comments: Cluster-wise OT to improve flow straightness is intuitive; no architectural changes required, making adoption practical.

model_io.model: COT-FM (flow matching with optimal transport reshaping)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Cluster-wise OT yields straighter vector fields and faster convergence
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; consistent acceleration and quality improvement

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70227-3.task: Determine prostaglandin and NSAID substrate selection and transport mechanism in SLCO2A1
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70227-3.key_results: Cryo-EM structures of SLCO2A1 bound to endogenous prostaglandins and four NSAIDs reveal molecular basis for substrate recognition; MD simulations elucidate substrate selection specificity
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70227-3.comments: Structures of drug-bound states provide valuable mechanistic detail for rational drug design, though cellular penetration kinetics and in vivo bioavailability remain incompletely characterized.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Substrate selection within SLCO superfamily depends on distinct molecular recognition features
hypotheses.result: Structures reveal specific binding pocket residues and ligand-protein contacts that rationalize PG and NSAID selectivity

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70772-x.task: Determine substrate binding and inhibition mechanism of human taurine transporter
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70772-x.key_results: Taurine, β-alanine, and cyclic P4S inhibitor all bind at the central substrate-binding site; inward-open conformation with TM1a bending facilitates intracellular gate opening
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70772-x.comments: High-resolution structural snapshots provide clear mechanistic insight, though dynamic conformational transitions during actual transport remain partially unexplored.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Taurine binds at a unique central site distinct from other ligands
hypotheses.result: All tested ligands (taurine, β-alanine, P4S) occupy the same substrate-binding site

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70775-8.task: Characterize RNAPII cluster formation, stability, and functional association with active genes during transcription
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70775-8.key_results: RNAPII clusters are stably associated with active gene loci; cluster formation depends on transcription initiation; cluster intensity strongly correlates with transcriptional output; clusters reflect local polymerase accumulation, not phase separation
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70775-8.comments: Single-molecule tracking data compellingly refute the phase separation hypothesis, though the precise molecular basis of cluster stability and its evolutionary advantage remain open questions.

model_io.model: Drosophila melanogaster embryo during Zygotic Genome Activation

hypotheses.hypothesis: RNAPII clusters form via phase separation or higher-order assembly mechanisms
hypotheses.result: Clusters reflect local accumulation of transcriptionally engaged polymerases; phase separation is not required

nature:10.1038/s41528-026-00565-1.task: Elucidate the functional role of whisking in hydrodynamic sensing by seal whiskers
nature:10.1038/s41528-026-00565-1.key_results: Undulated seal whiskers show 3-fold lower vortex-induced vibrations and >50-fold higher SNR than sea lion whiskers; active whisking is essential for prey tracking
nature:10.1038/s41528-026-00565-1.comments: Elegant bionic integration of natural whiskers with electrohydraulic actuators provides excellent experimental control, though field validation in natural hunting behavior remains limited.

model_io.model: Natural harbor seal whisker + electrohydraulic soft actuator
Bionic seal muzzle with 30 whiskers per side

hypotheses.hypothesis: Undulatory morphology alone suppresses self-induced noise
hypotheses.result: Seal whiskers show threefold lower VIV; morphology is necessary but active whisking further enhances SNR

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40355-3.task: Identify biophysical mechanisms underlying cross-excitation in dorsal root ganglia
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40355-3.key_results: Existing hypotheses (glial sheath interactions, neuron-neuron coupling) are individually and collectively insufficient to explain cross-excitation in normal conditions
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40355-3.comments: The paper identifies what is NOT responsible but leaves the true mechanism unresolved, highlighting a genuine gap in sensory neuroscience.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Classical neuron–neuron interactions through glial sheath gaps explain cross-excitation
hypotheses.result: Refuted; neither individual mechanisms nor their combinations adequately describe phenomenon

nature:10.1038/s41420-026-03041-x.task: Identify Pum2 as regulator of intestinal inflammation via macrophage-epithelial crosstalk
nature:10.1038/s41420-026-03041-x.key_results: Pum2 expression reduced in UC patient colonic tissue, inversely correlating with disease activity; Pum2 deficiency exacerbated DSS-induced colitis with heightened macrophage inflammation and TNFα-dependent epithelial necroptosis; dynamic downregulation occurs during active inflammation
nature:10.1038/s41420-026-03041-x.comments: The identification of Pum2 as a macrophage-epithelial crosstalk regulator is novel, though the direct molecular targets of Pum2 RNA-binding activity in this context require characterization.

model_io.model: UC patient colonic tissues; DSS-induced colitis; Pum2-deficient mice

hypotheses.hypothesis: Reduced Pum2 expression in UC correlates with disease activity
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; inverse correlation between Pum2 levels and disease activity

hypotheses.hypothesis: Pum2 deficiency exacerbates colitis by promoting macrophage hyperactivation and TNFα-dependent epithelial necroptosis
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; Pum2 loss drives heightened inflammation and barrier breakdown

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70271-z.task: Characterize mechanism controlling timely centrosome maturation during G2/M phase
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70271-z.key_results: CDK1 phosphorylates RNF40 (T529/T557) enabling PLK1 recruitment; acetylation-to-phosphorylation transition of RNF40 in late G2/M is required for centrosome maturation and bipolar spindle assembly
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70271-z.comments: The acetylation-to-phosphorylation switch is an elegant post-translational regulation mechanism for cell cycle control, though the acetylase/deacetylase involved remain unidentified.

hypotheses.hypothesis: CDK1-dependent RNF40 phosphorylation primes PLK1 binding
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; phosphorylation at T529/T557 promotes PLK1 recruitment

hypotheses.hypothesis: RNF40 acetylation inhibits centrosome maturation in interphase
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; constitutive acetylation impairs PLK1 localization and causes mitotic catastrophe

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70862-w.task: Demonstrate AP-1-mediated cellular memory formation during development of drug resistance
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70862-w.key_results: Cancer cells form AP-1-dependent cellular memories upon low-dose therapy exposure; adaptation enables resistance to high-dose therapy; memories are encoded in cis as chromatin accessibility changes; encoding occurs for both transiently induced and stochastically arising expression
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70862-w.comments: The cis-encoding of cellular memory through AP-1-dependent chromatin accessibility is an elegant example of epigenetic learning, though the stability and reversibility of these memories over extended timeframes warrant investigation.

model_io.model: Cancer cells with AP-1 two-color reporter system

hypotheses.hypothesis: Cancer cells encode transient therapy-induced gene expression into stable cellular memory via AP-1
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; AP-1-dependent cis-encoded chromatin accessibility maintains resistance

hypotheses.hypothesis: Cellular memories include both transcriptionally induced and stochastically arising expression patterns
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; memories encode both deterministic and probabilistic expression states

nature:10.1038/s41514-026-00366-w.task: Develop mitochondrial activators targeting MITOL for age-related cardiac dysfunction
nature:10.1038/s41514-026-00366-w.key_results: Berberrubine-based compounds (Mitorubin) increased MITOL expression, mitochondrial DNA content, and respiration; oral administration restored mitochondrial function, improved cardiac performance, suppressed hypertrophy, alleviated pulmonary congestion; extended lifespan in high-fat diet mice
nature:10.1038/s41514-026-00366-w.comments: The water-soluble derivative represents a practical formulation improvement, though long-term safety in aging populations requires additional investigation.

model_io.model: Cultured cardiomyocytes; age-related cardiac dysfunction model; high-fat diet mice

hypotheses.hypothesis: Mitorubin improves cardiac function by promoting MITOL expression and mitochondrial activation
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; Mitorubin increased MITOL, mitochondrial proteins, and cardiac performance

hypotheses.hypothesis: Mitorubin is safe under chronic administration
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; did not shorten lifespan in aged mice; extended lifespan in HFD mice

nature:10.1038/s41526-026-00583-3.task: Characterize microgravity effects on yeast cellular properties using dielectrophoresis
nature:10.1038/s41526-026-00583-3.key_results: Simulated microgravity (2D-clinostat) induced morphological and membrane changes in S. cerevisiae; reduced membrane folding factor impaired nutrient uptake and energy production; dielectric analysis revealed decreased membrane permittivity and conductivity
nature:10.1038/s41526-026-00583-3.comments: Dielectrophoresis provides novel biophysical insights into microgravity effects, though the functional consequences of altered membrane properties on long-term viability and metabolic capacity require further investigation.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Microgravity alters yeast cell membrane properties and morphology
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; reduced folding factor and altered membrane permittivity/conductivity observed

hypotheses.hypothesis: Microgravity-induced membrane changes impair nutrient uptake and energy production
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; reduced folding factor correlates with impaired cellular metabolism

nature:10.1038/s41556-026-01915-x.task: Develop correlative light and electron microscopy (Lipid-CLEM) workflow for nanoscale lipid visualization
nature:10.1038/s41556-026-01915-x.key_results: Lipid-CLEM enables quantification of relative lipid densities in membrane nanodomains; differential sphingomyelin partitioning observed in early endosome intraluminal vesicles, recycling tubules, and boundary membranes; nanoscale lipid organization previously only documented for proteins
nature:10.1038/s41556-026-01915-x.comments: The Lipid-CLEM method is a significant technical advance for spatial lipidomics, though validation of lipid-specific labeling fidelity and potential click chemistry artifacts in membranes should be comprehensively documented.

model_io.model: Cultured cells imaged by correlative light and electron microscopy

hypotheses.hypothesis: Lipid-CLEM enables nanoscale visualization of lipid organization in membrane nanodomains
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; differential sphingomyelin partitioning quantified across early endosome subcompartments

hypotheses.hypothesis: Lipids organize into nanoscale domains at cellular membranes
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; sphingomyelin enrichment observed in specific endosomal microdomains

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41253-4.task: Characterize MCH regulation of bone cell activities and calcium metabolism in regenerating scales
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41253-4.key_results: Single MCH treatment suppressed osteoclast-associated genes, decreased plasma calcium and TRAP activity; continuous MCH elevated both osteoblast (ALP) and osteoclast (TRAP) markers but decreased scale calcium; MCH receptor 2 involved in calcification regulation
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41253-4.comments: The biphasic response to single versus continuous MCH administration suggests complex feedback mechanisms in bone remodeling that may involve receptor desensitization or secondary signaling changes.

model_io.model: Cultured goldfish scales; goldfish in vivo

hypotheses.hypothesis: Single MCH treatment inhibits osteoclast activity and reduces plasma calcium
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; MCH suppressed osteoclast-associated genes and TRAP activity

hypotheses.hypothesis: Continuous MCH treatment coordinately affects osteoblasts and osteoclasts, decreasing scale calcification
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; prolonged MCH elevated both ALP and TRAP but reduced scale calcium

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44143-x.task: Characterize hypoxia-induced gene expression responses in early metazoan embryos
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44143-x.key_results: N. vectensis hypoxia induces reversible developmental arrest; transcriptomic profiling reveals conserved hypoxia-responsive genes and pathways shared with bilaterians; core HIF-dependent toolkit established in cnidarian–bilaterian ancestor
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44143-x.comments: Using a representative early-diverging metazoan strengthens evolutionary inferences, though the ecological relevance of O2 variability to Neoproterozoic environments could be better quantified.

hypotheses.hypothesis: N. vectensis embryogenesis is O2-dependent with reversible hypoxic arrest
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; hypoxia induces reversible developmental arrest

hypotheses.hypothesis: Embryonic hypoxia response toolkit is conserved between cnidarians and bilaterians
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; core hypoxia-responsive genes and pathways identified in N. vectensis

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44909-3.task: Elucidate thioredoxin protection against diabetic hearing loss via mitochondrial and microglial mechanisms
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44909-3.key_results: Trx1 overexpression inhibited PINK1/Parkin-mediated mitophagy via TOMM22 maintenance, increased mitochondrial membrane potential, reduced apoptosis; drove microglia M2 polarization; elevated serum Trx associated with decreased OAE parameters
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44909-3.comments: The dual mechanism (cell-autonomous mitochondrial homeostasis and non-autonomous microglial polarization) is well-supported, though the counterintuitive clinical association between elevated Trx and hearing loss requires careful interpretation.

model_io.model: Diabetic mouse cochlea; HEI-OC1 hair cells; BV-2 microglia

hypotheses.hypothesis: Trx1 protects hair cells by suppressing PINK1/Parkin-mediated mitophagy via TOMM22
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; TOMM22 inhibition reversed Trx1 protection

hypotheses.hypothesis: Trx1 indirectly protects hair cells through microglial M2 polarization
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; conditioned medium from Trx1-treated microglia protected hair cells

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-45003-4.task: Determine depot-specific role of Hsp47 in adipose inflammation during high-fat diet
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-45003-4.key_results: Hsp47 mRNA/protein increased in ingWAT after 12-week HFD; adipocyte-specific Hsp47 knockout reduced adipocyte size, fibrosis markers, and pro-inflammatory genes specifically in ingWAT with minimal epiWAT effect
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-45003-4.comments: The depot-specific differences suggest distinct mechanical or metabolic properties between inguinal and epididymal fat, warranting further investigation of tissue-intrinsic factors.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Hsp47 contributes to HFD-induced adipose dysfunction via collagen-integrin signaling
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; Hsp47 aKO reduces inflammation and fibrosis in ingWAT

hypotheses.hypothesis: Hsp47 effects are depot-independent
hypotheses.result: Refuted; minimal effects observed in epiWAT compared to ingWAT

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-45127-7.task: Determine mechanism of hepatocyte damage in cystic echinococcosis via NLRP3-mediated pyroptosis
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-45127-7.key_results: E. granulosus excretory-secretory products (ESPs) induced hepatocyte pyroptosis via ROS-NLRP3 inflammasome pathway; NLRP3 inhibition (MCC950) and ROS scavenging (NAC) markedly attenuated ESP-induced cytotoxicity and pyroptosis
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-45127-7.comments: The ROS-NLRP3 mechanism is well-established in inflammatory pathologies, though identification of specific parasite-derived DAMP(s) triggering inflammasome activation would strengthen mechanistic understanding.

model_io.model: AML-12 hepatocytes exposed to E. granulosus ESPs

hypotheses.hypothesis: ESP-induced hepatocyte damage occurs via NLRP3 inflammasome-dependent pyroptosis
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; NLRP3 inhibition markedly reduced cytotoxicity and pyroptosis

hypotheses.hypothesis: Pyroptosis is ROS-dependent
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; ROS scavenger NAC suppressed pyroptosis and inflammasome activation

nature:10.1038/s42003-026-09892-5.task: Identify redundant protein synthesis genes that regulate autophagy independently of mTORC1
nature:10.1038/s42003-026-09892-5.key_results: Aimp1, a non-essential multi-aminoacyl tRNA synthetase complex member, limits autophagy by uncoupling mTORC1 activity while minimally affecting protein synthesis; Aimp1 depletion impairs innate immunity kinetics in myeloid cells
nature:10.1038/s42003-026-09892-5.comments: The challenge to the canonical inverse relationship between translation and autophagy is valuable, though the immunological phenotype suggests Aimp1 has broader roles beyond the protein synthesis-autophagy axis.

model_io.model: Mammalian cells; murine myeloid cells; Aimp1 knockout models

hypotheses.hypothesis: Aimp1 functions redundantly for protein synthesis but uniquely limits autophagy
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; Aimp1 depletion minimally affects translation but enhances autophagy

hypotheses.hypothesis: Aimp1 uncouples mTORC1 from autophagy suppression
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; Aimp1 depletion reduces mTORC1-mediated autophagy inhibition

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70584-z.task: International validation and refinement of AI for acute leukemia subtype prediction from routine laboratory data
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70584-z.key_results: Pretrained model achieved AUROC 0.94 (AML), 0.98 (APL), 0.84 (ALL) with high confidence cutoff; ensemble (Isolation Forest + LOF) improved AML AUROC to 0.84 for below-threshold patients with only 12.1% exclusion
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70584-z.comments: Large diverse international cohort (6206 patients, 20 centers) strengthens generalizability; ensemble approach addressing confident-threshold exclusion is pragmatic but reflects model uncertainty rather than robustness.

model_io.model: Pretrained neural network + ensemble (Isolation Forest + Local Outlier Factor)
inputs: routine laboratory results (complete blood count, biochemistry)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Pretrained AI model generalizes across international centers for leukemia diagnosis
hypotheses.result: Confirmed with high AUROC for AML and APL; partial for ALL

hypotheses.hypothesis: Ensemble anomaly detection improves predictions for below-threshold patients
hypotheses.result: Confirmed, improving AML AUROC while reducing exclusion rate

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70645-3.task: Spatial transcriptomics deconvolution to map immune cell subpopulations
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70645-3.key_results: UCASpatial identified low-abundant cell subpopulations in colorectal cancer and revealed IL11-IL11RA signaling drives pro-fibrotic community in wound healing
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70645-3.comments: Entropy-based weighting is a novel technical contribution, though biological validation is limited to wound healing and one cancer type.

hypotheses.hypothesis: IL11-IL11RA signaling in stromal-immune triad drives fibrosis

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70937-8.task: Disease-agnostic ensemble forecasting for infectious disease outbreaks
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70937-8.key_results: epiFFORMA outperformed equal-weighting and individual models on 10 diseases; 23–31% improvement in some metrics
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70937-8.comments: Synthetic data-driven weighting is elegant for emerging diseases, but real-time performance on novel pathogens remains unvalidated.

hypotheses.result: Confirmed across 10 infectious diseases

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70957-4.task: Elucidation of regulatory mechanisms controlling esophageal progenitor plasticity and metaplasia susceptibility
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70957-4.key_results: Sox9 induction via Hedgehog and TGF-β/BMP signaling promotes squamo-columnar junction progenitor state; Cox-2 modulates plasticity through epithelial cell-intrinsic mechanism

hypotheses.hypothesis: Hedgehog signaling indirectly induces Sox9 via epithelial-stromal communication and directly via cell-autonomous mechanisms

hypotheses.result: Confirmed in both mouse and human models

nature:10.1038/s41587-026-03064-w.task: Framework and roadmap for generalist biological AI across DNA, RNA, protein, and cellular systems
nature:10.1038/s41587-026-03064-w.key_results: Synthesized advances in foundation models for molecular sequence and structure; identified opportunities in synergizing language and structural AI, autonomous discovery agents, and virtual cell integration
nature:10.1038/s41587-026-03064-w.comments: Comprehensive review articulating the vision of multimodal biological AI; challenges (data, complexity, validation) are identified but solutions remain largely programmatic rather than algorithmic.

nature:10.1038/s41592-026-03037-6.task: Framework development for open and sustainable AI in life sciences
nature:10.1038/s41592-026-03037-6.key_results: Mapped 300+ ecosystem components and provided implementation pathways for reproducible AI
nature:10.1038/s41592-026-03037-6.comments: A perspective piece identifying systemic challenges rather than providing algorithmic innovations; focuses on governance and best practices.

nature:10.1038/s41592-026-03044-7.task: Whole-slide image analysis integration with omics workflows
nature:10.1038/s41592-026-03044-7.key_results: LazySlide enables tissue/cell segmentation, feature extraction, and zero-shot classification via vision-language models
nature:10.1038/s41592-026-03044-7.comments: Leverages existing foundation models rather than novel methodology; value lies in workflow integration and scverse compatibility.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41671-4.task: Training spiking neural networks via forward-forward algorithm without backpropagation
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41671-4.key_results: FF-SNN achieved accuracy comparable to backpropagation-trained SNNs on static datasets; outperformed on complex spiking task SHD with lighter architecture
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41671-4.comments: Forward-forward training offers biological plausibility and hardware efficiency, but scalability to large-scale tasks and true neuromorphic hardware deployment remain undemonstrated.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Forward-forward algorithm trains SNNs comparably to backpropagation on static data
hypotheses.result: Confirmed with competitive accuracy

hypotheses.hypothesis: FF-SNN outperforms backpropagation SNNs on complex spiking tasks
hypotheses.result: Confirmed on SHD dataset

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42561-5.task: Identification of heat-stress tolerance biomarker panel in tomato via meta-analysis and machine learning
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42561-5.key_results: Four-gene signature (Solyc09g074500, Solyc01g102960, Solyc07g042230, Solyc02g091990) achieved 98.5% classification accuracy and AUC > 0.95
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42561-5.comments: Rigorous multi-method integration (meta-analysis, WGCNA, SVM-RFE, LASSO) with high predictive performance, but functional validation in heat stress is absent.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43396-w.task: Statistical modeling of tumor stiffness heterogeneity via atomic force microscopy maps

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43618-1.task: Identification of exosome-related gene biomarkers in primary immune thrombocytopenia

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43618-1.comments: Exploratory bioinformatic-experimental integration with acknowledged limitations (immune infiltration analysis removed); HIBADH lacked experimental validation, weakening the four-gene panel.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43737-9.task: Identification of lipophagy-associated biomarkers in diabetes
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43737-9.key_results: CCR1 and EGR2 identified as hub genes; CCR1-/- mice showed improved glucose homeostasis under high-fat diet
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43737-9.comments: Multi-method convergence (WGCNA + machine learning) is solid; animal validation adds credibility but mechanistic link to lipophagy is inferred rather than directly demonstrated.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44691-2.task: Classification of copy number variants from whole-exome sequencing using convolutional attention neural network
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44691-2.key_results: CNN-Att achieved macro F1 = 0.83, macro PR-AUC = 0.93 on held-out test; cross-platform F1 up to 0.96 across four sequencing technologies
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44691-2.comments: Attention mechanism elegantly highlights weak depth signals for small events; robust cross-platform performance is valuable for clinical deployment, though training on only seven expert-annotated samples limits generalizability.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Attention-based CNN generalizes better across sequencing platforms than heuristic-based callers

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44843-4.task: Optimization of federated learning with confidential computing and privacy-communication tradeoffs
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44843-4.key_results: CC-PGD reduces privacy leakage 23–31% and communication cost 18–27% vs baselines with O(1/√T) convergence guarantee
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44843-4.comments: First framework explicitly accounting for TEE side-channel vulnerabilities in federated learning; theoretical rigor is strong but real-world TEE threat modeling may be conservative.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Joint optimization of privacy and communication outperforms independent treatments
hypotheses.result: Confirmed on MNIST and CIFAR-10 under IID and non-IID partitioning

nature:10.1038/s41597-026-07059-9.task: High-resolution climate projections dataset production and validation
nature:10.1038/s41597-026-07059-9.key_results: 0.0375° × 0.0375° spatial resolution downscaled CMIP6 data for Senegal across 19 models, 1850–2100 for three SSP scenarios
nature:10.1038/s41597-026-07059-9.comments: Primarily a data paper with statistical downscaling and quality control; limited novel methodological contribution.

outputs: high-resolution daily climate variables (temp, precip, radiation)

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40975-9.task: Network automation performance evaluation for dense IP networks
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40975-9.key_results: Automated topology creation (EVE-NG, Pllama, Container LAB) is 4.5× faster than manual; configuration generation automation ~10% faster than manual; test execution 11× faster than manual
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40975-9.comments: Empirical benchmark study; useful for practitioners but limited novelty in methodology or theoretical contribution.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41199-7.task: Robust adaptive sampled-data control for high-renewable smart grids
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41199-7.key_results: Adaptive controller reduces settling time by 33%, overshoot by 52%, control energy cost by 40% vs. fixed-gain baselines under realistic communication impairments
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41199-7.comments: Rigorously certified via LMI conditions; effectively bridges communication-aware scheduling with control stability under bounded delay and jitter.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Real-time feedback gain scheduling based on communication quality improves stability under variable conditions

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42057-2.task: Atomic clock signal denoising via hyperbolic tangent threshold

hypotheses.hypothesis: Smooth hyperbolic tangent threshold reduces discontinuity artifacts
hypotheses.result: Better SNR and RMSE than hard/soft thresholding while preserving signal fidelity

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42295-4.task: Adaptive feature selection for encrypted traffic intrusion detection
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42295-4.key_results: AFS improves detection accuracy 24.74% and reduces training time 35% vs. PCA-based methods on CIRA-CIC-DoHBrw-2020 dataset
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42295-4.comments: Incorporates gradient-based relevance for context-sensitive detection; practical gain for cybersecurity in energy systems.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Gradient-based relevance captures malicious patterns in encrypted traffic better than statistical relevance alone
hypotheses.result: 24.74% accuracy improvement and 35% training time reduction vs. PCA

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43137-z.task: Frequency-constrained robust unit commitment with physics-guided surrogates
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43137-z.key_results: FC-RUC reduces total operating cost by 24.4% (IEEE 9-bus) and 27.5% (IEEE 118-bus) while satisfying all frequency-security constraints under N–k contingencies
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43137-z.comments: Physics-informed piecewise-linear surrogates for nadir constraints are elegant; column-and-constraint generation avoids full enumeration tractably.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Physics-guided nadir surrogates + adaptive virtual inertia improve frequency resilience under high renewables
hypotheses.result: All frequency constraints satisfied; 24–27% cost reduction vs. conventional UC

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44641-y.task: Multimodal fusion via adaptive graph signal processing with dynamic semantic alignment

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44903-9.task: Reliability-based design of tunnel concrete linings using AI surrogate and CCM
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44903-9.key_results: Framework quantifies failure probability (Pf) and reliability index (β) for two lining types; FRPC (65 MPa) significantly reduces Pf at intermediate thicknesses vs. conventional concrete (20 MPa); surrogate model achieves high consistency with slight conservatism
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44903-9.comments: Well-integrated framework (CCM + Monte Carlo + FORM + AI surrogate) providing decision charts for risk-consistent design; practical utility for geotechnical engineering.

hypotheses.hypothesis: AI surrogate accurately reproduces probabilistic trends from CCM + Monte Carlo
hypotheses.result: Surrogate achieves high consistency with slight conservatism; enables rapid parametric analysis

hypotheses.hypothesis: FRPC (high strength) reduces Pf more efficiently than thickness increase alone

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-45111-1.task: Blockchain-based digital copyright transaction with multi-center chameleon hashing
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-45111-1.key_results: Scheme supports data redaction, flexible node management, and efficient private key broadcast in multi-node scenarios; satisfies confidentiality and malicious-node resistance

hypotheses.result: Confidentiality of transferor, resistance to malicious nodes, private key confidentiality achieved

nature:10.1038/s41467-025-67795-1.task: Observing quark-gluon plasma signatures in small collision systems
nature:10.1038/s41467-025-67795-1.key_results: Distinctive baryon-meson flow grouping observed in proton-lead and proton-proton collisions; consistent with hydrodynamic flow and quark coalescence
nature:10.1038/s41467-025-67795-1.comments: Extends QGP signatures beyond heavy-ion collisions to smaller systems, challenging prior assumptions about minimum system size; interpretation via quark coalescence is physically motivated but model-dependent.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Quark-gluon plasma forms in high-multiplicity proton-proton and proton-lead collisions

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70728-1.task: Scalable fluidic memristor array for neuromorphic computing
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70728-1.key_results: 10×10 confined hydrogel fluidic memristor array fabricated; 89.5% classification accuracy on MNIST handwritten digits; demonstrated neuromorphic behaviors (paired-pulse facilitation/depression, spike-rate-dependent plasticity)
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70728-1.comments: Novel gel-gel interface design enables scalability, but comparison with solid-state memristors on energy efficiency and speed is absent; practical deployment complexity remains high.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70865-7.task: Physics-informed machine learning for optoelectronic property prediction in large-scale systems
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70865-7.key_results: HAMSTER framework accurately predicts quantum Hamiltonians and optoelectronic properties across temperature/compositional variations; scalable to ~10,000 atom systems with few first-principles calculations
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70865-7.comments: Hybrid physics-ML approach balances interpretability and data efficiency; demonstration on halide perovskites is relevant, but transferability to other material classes remains to be tested.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Physics-informed approximate models require fewer data points than pure ML

nature:10.1038/s41566-026-01857-8.task: Precision spectroscopy of inner-shell clock transition in ytterbium for fundamental physics tests
nature:10.1038/s41566-026-01857-8.key_results: ~100-fold improvement in spectroscopy precision; isotope shift measurements below 10-Hz uncertainty; constraints on hypothetical electron-neutron mediating boson
nature:10.1038/s41566-026-01857-8.comments: Magic-wavelength lattice trapping elegantly enables access to previously inaccessible precision; results are fundamental for dark matter and Lorentz invariance searches.
