hypotheses.hypothesis: Optimal vaccination strategy derived via neural networks minimizes pandemic expenditures vs actual rollout
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; simulated strategy achieves 22.3% cost reduction, exceeding actual by 4–6%

nature:10.1038/s42003-026-09914-2.task: Multi-omics evaluation of cell line suitability for metastatic prostate cancer modeling
nature:10.1038/s42003-026-09914-2.key_results: Substantial genomic differences between cell lines and metastatic samples; PC3 shows poor transcriptomic/epigenomic similarity to all subtypes; mesenchymal stem-like organoids exhibit higher fidelity than engineered cell lines
nature:10.1038/s42003-026-09914-2.comments: Important resource characterization study revealing limitations of widely-used models; guides future model selection but doesn't provide actionable therapeutic targets.

inputs: Public multi-omics data from cell lines, patient metastatic samples, organoids
outputs: Similarity matrices, subtype associations, mutation burden correlation with microenvironment

hypotheses.hypothesis: PC3 cell line recapitulates metastatic prostate cancer transcriptomics
hypotheses.result: Rejected; PC3 exhibits poor similarity to all subtypes

hypotheses.hypothesis: Hypermutation influences tumor microenvironment composition
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; mutational burden significantly associated with immune infiltration

nature:10.1038/s41597-026-06777-4.task: Synthetic 3D avatar generation using SUPR parametric model
nature:10.1038/s41597-026-06777-4.key_results: 84,000 synthetic subjects; SUPR outperforms prior representations for avatar mesh generation
nature:10.1038/s41597-026-06777-4.comments: Synthetic generation avoids privacy issues but validation against real human body diversity is not explicitly addressed.

nature:10.1038/s41597-026-07098-2.task: 3D facial dataset construction with standardized topology and emotion diversity
nature:10.1038/s41597-026-07098-2.key_results: 98 East Asian subjects; 6 emotions + 9 FACS action units; unified mesh topology via FLAME + Edge-NICP
nature:10.1038/s41597-026-07098-2.comments: Topology standardization enables direct comparisons but small sample size (N=98) limits generalizability; multi-view RGB only for subset.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-38433-7.task: Wave energy converter hydrodynamic efficiency under variable seabed and wave conditions
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-38433-7.key_results: Optimal efficiency at relative opening α=50%; elevated axial velocity at T=1.87s for high steepness; uneven seabed reduces efficiency vs. flat bottom
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-38433-7.comments: Numerical tank (VOF/Fluent) well-validated but sensitivity to turbulence model choice not explored; field testing needed for practical WEC design.

model_io.model: ANSYS Fluent (VOF method, Stokes wave generation)

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-38542-3.task: Crossflow heat exchanger performance with optimized splitter geometry via fluid-structure interaction
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-38542-3.key_results: Backwards-facing splitters enhance Nusselt number (Nu) while maintaining Performance Evaluation Criterion (PEC>1); optimal L/D balances heat gain vs. pressure drop; 3D/2D validation ±12–14% vs. experiment
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-38542-3.comments: Rigorous CFD with validation and practical design guidelines; structural stress on splitter plates and real-world fouling not addressed.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-39956-9.task: Neuroimaging-driven personalized sports training and injury prevention recommendation
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-39956-9.key_results: NeuroAthleteNet + NeuroSportSync multimodal framework improves predictive accuracy and interpretability over traditional neuroimaging analysis
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-39956-9.comments: Novel integration of fMRI/EEG with biomechanics is conceptually sound but no quantitative performance metrics provided; reproducibility unclear without code/data release.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41602-3.task: Wind energy MPPT feature selection via hybrid MI filtering and multi-objective binary harmony search
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41602-3.key_results: Dimensionality reduction 76.9–87.5% (464→58–97 features Kelmarsh; 87→8–21 VV); RMSE improvements 9.4–14.7% over full-feature baseline; 20.6–28.6% vs. MI alone

hypotheses.hypothesis: Hybrid MI + AMO-BHS outperforms full-feature and single-method FS approaches

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43794-0.task: Aerobics movement recognition and secure training data management via CNN and blockchain
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43794-0.key_results: 96.8% accuracy on custom aerobics dataset; blockchain integration increases traceability efficiency by 38.2%
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43794-0.comments: Multi-scale convolution + dual attention is effective but blockchain overhead for real-time systems not quantified; generalization beyond aerobics unclear.

model_io.model: Multi-channel multi-scale CNN + dual attention + blockchain

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44226-9.task: Analytical thermal modeling of PCM-cooled lithium-ion batteries
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44226-9.key_results: Perturbation + Green's function solution predicts temperature profiles with <5% error; core temperature remains hotter than surface; improving battery thermal conductivity crucial
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44226-9.comments: Analytical solution avoids computational expense of FEM/CFD but assumes idealized geometry; practical pack design integration not addressed.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44553-x.task: Unsupervised discovery of climate discourse rhetorical strategies

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44629-8.task: Bearing fault diagnosis under imbalanced data via ensemble EBRB with KL divergence

hypotheses.hypothesis: KL divergence captures probability distribution differences better than Euclidean distance

hf:2603.14999.task: Lossless text compression using aperiodic hierarchical structures

hf:2603.14999.comments: Theoretically elegant proof that Fibonacci tilings avoid collapse via Golden Compensation, but practical compression gains depend heavily on dataset size and whether deep hierarchy levels activate.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Aperiodic Fibonacci hierarchies avoid finite-depth collapse of periodic tilings
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; periodic tilings collapse after O(log p) levels, Fibonacci maintains positions at all scales

hypotheses.hypothesis: Dictionary reuse efficiency remains scale-invariant in Fibonacci hierarchies
hypotheses.result: Confirmed via Golden Compensation property with asymptotic coverage Wφ/5

hypotheses.hypothesis: Deeper hierarchy levels activate more effectively in aperiodic structures at large scales
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; 20.7 MB savings attributable to Fibonacci tiling on enwik9

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70143-6.key_results: Three gaits identified: wandering (10× higher diffusivity than circling), circling, and circling-and-wandering; circling-and-wandering mode optimizes spreading in porous media with increasing geometric complexity
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70143-6.comments: Elegant demonstration that stochastic motility switching provides adaptive advantage in complex environments, though biological triggers for transitions remain unclear.

model_io.model: Bull sperm in microfluidic chambers and porous media simulations

hypotheses.hypothesis: Hyperactivation drives circling-and-wandering behavior
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; three distinct gaits observed with hyperactivation-dependent transitions

hypotheses.hypothesis: Combined gait provides better migration in complex environments
hypotheses.result: Confirmed by stochastic transport simulations

nature:10.1038/s41535-026-00876-6.task: Identify disorder and strain as suppressors of phonon thermal Hall effect
nature:10.1038/s41535-026-00876-6.key_results: High-κ SrTiO₃ exhibits thermal Hall angle up to 0.3% at 9 T; disordered samples show negligible effect; annealing restores ~0.1% signal with minimal change in κ; metallic/insulating contacts yield identical results
nature:10.1038/s41535-026-00876-6.comments: Definitively rules out parasitic contact effects and reveals extreme sensitivity to structural disorder, constraining theoretical models of phonon Berry curvature.

model_io.model: SrTiO₃ crystal with variable disorder and metallic/insulating contacts

hypotheses.hypothesis: Thermal Hall effect is intrinsic and decouples from longitudinal κ
hypotheses.result: Confirmed by annealing restoring THE while leaving κ unchanged

hypotheses.hypothesis: Contact effects are negligible for THE measurement
hypotheses.result: Confirmed by identical results with metallic and insulating contacts

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44862-1.task: Predict spintronic and energy-harvesting properties of double perovskite K₂OsCl₆
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44862-1.key_results: Ferromagnetic ground state with ~1.99 µB/f.u.; half-metallic with 100% spin polarization; Seebeck ~180 µV/K at 900 K; low thermal conductivity 2.8 W m⁻¹ K⁻¹
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44862-1.comments: DFT predicts promising spintronic material but experimental validation and stability analysis against oxidation required.

hypotheses.hypothesis: K₂OsCl₆ exhibits half-metallicity with Os-dominated magnetism
hypotheses.result: Confirmed by spin-resolved band structure showing ~100% spin polarization

hf:2603.22458.task: Document OCR via diffusion-based parallel decoding
hf:2603.22458.key_results: 3.2x faster decoding than autoregressive baselines; improved robustness on long documents
hf:2603.22458.comments: Reframing OCR as inverse rendering is conceptually appealing, though the 3.2x speedup claim should be validated against contemporary autoregressive VLM baselines.

outputs: structured text with layout, tables, formulas

hypotheses.hypothesis: Parallel diffusion decoding reduces error propagation and latency compared to left-to-right autoregressive decoding
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: achieved 3.2x speedup with improved robustness

hypotheses.hypothesis: Diffusion models have reduced dependence on linguistic priors vs. autoregressive models
hypotheses.result: Confirmed on Semantic Shuffle benchmark

hf:2603.23497.task: Action-conditioned world modeling dataset with explicit state annotations
hf:2603.23497.key_results: 108M frames, 450+ actions, synchronized skeleton/camera/depth annotations; reveals persistent challenges in long-horizon state consistency
hf:2603.23497.comments: WildWorld addresses a real gap in sim-to-real world models by providing state-aware action labels, though the benchmark's ARPG origin may not fully transfer to other domains.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Explicit state annotations enable learning of structured world dynamics better than pixels alone
hypotheses.result: Extensive experiments reveal persistent challenges in state-aware video generation, suggesting hypothesis partially unconfirmed

hf:2603.20422.task: Personalized streaming video understanding with real-time feedback
hf:2603.20422.key_results: PEARL-Bench: 132 videos, 2,173 fine-grained annotations; PEARL baseline achieves SOTA on 8 models with consistent improvements across 3 architectures
hf:2603.20422.comments: Streaming personalization is a practical problem, but the proposed training-free method's generalization to truly novel concepts needs further validation.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Training-free strategies can improve personalized video understanding across diverse VLM architectures
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: consistent improvements on 3 distinct architectures

hf:2603.23499.task: Optical flow estimation under real-world corruptions
hf:2603.23499.key_results: DA-Flow substantially outperforms existing methods under severe degradation across multiple benchmarks
hf:2603.23499.comments: Leveraging diffusion model features for correspondence is clever, but quantitative benchmarks and comparisons are needed.

model_io.model: DA-Flow (diffusion features + CNN features + iterative refinement)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Image restoration diffusion models' intermediate representations contain corruption-aware but non-temporal information useful for optical flow
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: adding spatio-temporal attention yields zero-shot correspondence capability

hf:2603.23483.task: Accelerating agentic multimodal LLMs via speculative execution
hf:2603.23483.key_results: 1.1–3.35x speedup with up to +6.7% accuracy improvement; maintains throughput under concurrent workloads
hf:2603.23483.comments: Speculative execution for agentic systems is practical, but the cognitive gating mechanism's generalization beyond the tested benchmarks remains unclear.

model_io.model: SpecEyes (lightweight speculative MLLM + large MLLM + heterogeneous parallel funnel)

hypotheses.hypothesis: A lightweight tool-free MLLM can predict execution trajectory and enable early termination of expensive tool chains
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: 1.1–3.35x speedup achieved

hypotheses.hypothesis: Answer separability is a reliable confidence signal for speculative termination without oracle labels
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: cognitive gating based on answer separability works effectively

hf:2603.22386.task: Survey of workflow optimization for LLM agents
hf:2603.22386.key_results: Unified framework organizing static vs. dynamic workflow design; structure-aware evaluation perspective proposed
hf:2603.22386.comments: Comprehensive survey providing useful vocabulary and taxonomy, but lacks empirical comparisons of different optimization strategies.

hf:2603.23386.task: Part-level decomposition and kinematic prediction for articulated 3D assets
hf:2603.23386.key_results: 70% token reduction via Sparse 3D VQ-VAE; SOTA on PartNet-Mobility; enables physics-based robotic simulation
hf:2603.23386.comments: Using MLLMs for sim-ready asset generation is novel, but comparison with traditional multi-stage pipelines needs quantitative error analysis.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Sparse 3D tokenization enables unified joint reasoning over static and kinematic structure
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: 70% token reduction while achieving SOTA performance

hf:2603.23500.task: Unified policy optimization for reasoning-driven image generation
hf:2603.23500.key_results: Seamlessly integrates GRPO for reasoning and FlowGRPO for image synthesis; enhanced image quality through reasoning
hf:2603.23500.comments: Unified RL framework for interleaved generation is interesting, but multi-round evaluation and comparison with baseline methods is limited.

hypotheses.hypothesis: MSE penalty on velocity fields provides more robust regularization than KL penalty for mitigating reward hacking
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: MSE penalty more effective than standard latent KL

hypotheses.hypothesis: Removing classifier-free guidance maintains linear rollouts necessary for scaling to multi-turn generation
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: linear unbranched rollouts achieved

hf:2603.23462.task: Lifting rendered scenes to photorealistic video
hf:2603.23462.key_results: Preserves 3D geometry/dynamics of rendered input while transforming materials/lighting; outperforms existing video editing baselines
hf:2603.23462.comments: Anchor-based propagation strategy for paired-data generation is clever, but evaluation limited to GTA-V sequences.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Diffusion features from anchor-enhanced frames can propagate realism across intermediate frames via geometric conditioning
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: method successfully maintains 3D consistency while enhancing photorealism

hf:2603.21064.task: Pose-free feed-forward 3D Gaussian splatting via two-expert design
hf:2603.21064.key_results: Outperforms pose-free baselines; matches posed methods in <5K iterations; separates geometry from appearance estimation
hf:2603.21064.comments: Two-expert design is intuitive, but the claim that unified architectures are 'suboptimal' needs more rigorous ablation across architectures.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Explicitly separating geometry and appearance improves 3DGS fidelity vs. monolithic unified models
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: two-expert design substantially outperforms unified approaches

hf:2603.22847.task: Token-level policy optimization for multimodal chain-of-thought reasoning
hf:2603.22847.key_results: PEPO improves robustness across geometry, visual grounding, puzzles, and few-shot classification; stable training dynamics
hf:2603.22847.comments: Token-level granularity for RL is appropriate for reasoning, but the perception prior derivation could be better motivated theoretically.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Token-level advantages derived from perception-exploration decomposition improve reasoning stability
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: consistent improvements with stable training across benchmarks

hf:2603.12254.task: Efficient long-form video understanding via autoregressive patch selection
hf:2603.12254.key_results: 4x–100x visual token reduction; up to 19x ViT/MLLM acceleration; enables 1K-frame 4K-resolution video processing; 67.0% on VideoMME
hf:2603.12254.comments: AutoGaze's patch selection strategy is practical, and HLVid provides a needed high-resolution benchmark, though the method's applicability to very long sequences (>1K frames) needs exploration.

model_io.model: AutoGaze (lightweight selection module trained via next-token prediction + RL)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Autoregressive patch selection trained on next-token prediction can reduce visual tokens while preserving information
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: 4x–100x reduction with minimal information loss

hypotheses.hypothesis: RL fine-tuning improves selection under user-specified error thresholds
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: on-policy optimization improves patch selection quality

hf:2603.22003.task: Spatial grounding interface for vision-language-action models
hf:2603.22003.key_results: 5% improvement on Robocasa-GR1-Tabletop; 8.3% on SimplerEnv; improves over QwenOFT and GR00T baselines
hf:2603.22003.comments: Decoupling reasoning and execution via visual prompts is intuitive, but evaluation is limited to simulation environments; real-world validation needed.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Explicit spatial prompting (crosshairs, bounding boxes) improves precision vs. end-to-end black-box mapping
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: 5–8.3% success rate improvement

hf:2603.22281.task: VLM-guided latent world modeling for long-horizon forecasting
hf:2603.22281.key_results: Outperforms VLM-only and JEPA-only baselines; more robust long-horizon rollout behavior
hf:2603.22281.comments: Combining dense-frame dynamics with uniformly-sampled semantic guidance is well-motivated, but quantitative improvements on benchmark tasks are not clearly stated.

model_io.model: ThinkJEPA (dense JEPA branch + VLM thinker branch with hierarchical pyramid extraction)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Dual-temporal pathways combining fine-grained dynamics and long-horizon semantics improve forecast robustness
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: outperforms single-modality baselines

hf:2603.22327.task: Automating systematic literature reviews in epidemiology
hf:2603.22327.key_results: 58x speed-up (7 weeks → 20 hours); performance comparable to human researchers on 9 WHO-priority pathogens
hf:2603.22327.comments: Impressive application of agentic AI to evidence synthesis, but the 'comparable to human' claim needs clearer definition of agreement metrics and inter-rater reliability baselines.

model_io.model: AgentSLR (agentic pipeline with LLM calls, retrieval, extraction, synthesis)
outputs: systematic review report with extracted data

hypotheses.hypothesis: Agentic AI can automate end-to-end systematic review workflow with performance parity to human experts
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: 58x speed-up with comparable accuracy on tested domains

hf:2603.21937.task: Attribute misbinding evaluation in multi-subject image generation
hf:2603.21937.key_results: MultiBind reveals binding failures missed by conventional metrics; dimension-wise confusion protocol separates self-degradation from cross-subject interference
hf:2603.21937.comments: The benchmark is well-designed for a real failure mode in multi-subject generation, but only tested on static image generation; video generation evaluation would strengthen the work.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Dimension-wise confusion metrics can separate self-degradation from true cross-subject misbinding better than holistic fidelity metrics
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: MultiBind exposes interpretable failure patterns (drift, swap, dominance, blending)

hf:2603.22606.task: Dense future trajectory generation from video
hf:2603.22606.key_results: Extends prediction horizon from 24 to 81 frames; improves motion realism and stability; supports downstream video generation/editing
hf:2603.22606.comments: Three-component framework is well-designed, but comparison with other trajectory prediction methods lacks detail; benefits to downstream generation tasks are claimed but not rigorously evaluated.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Offset encoding from pixel-center anchors reduces location-dependent bias in trajectory prediction
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: enables learning over longer horizons

hypotheses.hypothesis: Flow matching with boundary cues enables stable long-horizon trajectory generation
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: extends prediction from 24 to 81 frames with improved stability

hf:2603.22529.task: Web agent benchmark grounded in egocentric video perception
hf:2603.22529.key_results: First benchmark pairing egocentric video with web tasks; Ego2WebJudge achieves ~84% agreement with human judgment; SoTA agents show weak performance with substantial headroom
hf:2603.22529.comments: Addresses a real gap in agent benchmarking by combining physical and digital perception, though the 84% judge agreement suggests room for improvement in automated evaluation.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Egocentric visual grounding is necessary for web agent performance on real-world scenarios
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: agents show weak performance, indicating substantial task difficulty

hf:2603.22446.task: Token-level analysis of distributional shifts in RLVR fine-tuning
hf:2603.22446.key_results: Only small fraction of tokens show meaningful divergence; sparse changes directly responsible for RL gains; cross-sampling interventions isolate critical tokens
hf:2603.22446.comments: Fine-grained mechanistic analysis is thorough, but findings may be specific to tested datasets/models; generalization to other RL objectives needs investigation.

model_io.model: RLVR fine-tuning (base LLM with RL policy gradient)

hypotheses.hypothesis: RLVR induces sparse, targeted token distribution shifts rather than wholesale changes
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: only small fraction of tokens meaningfully diverge

hypotheses.hypothesis: Small number of RL-sampled tokens inserted into base generations recovers RL performance gains
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: cross-sampling experiments isolate critical token decisions

hf:2603.22042.task: Hierarchical part-to-whole alignment in hyperbolic vision-language models
hf:2603.22042.key_results: SOTA on zero-shot classification, retrieval, multi-label classification; models part-to-whole semantic representativeness with hyperbolic uncertainty
hf:2603.22042.comments: Uncertainty-guided compositional alignment is novel, but the practical impact of capturing hierarchical structure on downstream applications remains unclear.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Modeling part-to-whole semantic representativeness via hyperbolic uncertainty improves compositional understanding
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: SOTA on multi-object scene understanding benchmarks

hf:2603.23495.task: Efficient LVLM inference via sparse vision-language interactions
hf:2603.23495.key_results: Matches/exceeds SOTA while drastically reducing computational cost; excels in challenging tasks requiring fine-grained visual understanding
hf:2603.23495.comments: VISOR's approach of sparsifying interactions rather than compressing images is practical, though the dynamic allocation policy's per-sample overhead and complexity are not fully characterized.

model_io.model: VISOR (universal network with dynamic self-attention allocation)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Sparsifying vision-language interactions reduces cost while preserving performance on fine-grained tasks
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: matches SOTA with reduced computational cost

hypotheses.hypothesis: Dynamic policy allocation based on per-sample complexity improves efficiency
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: adaptive allocation improves results on challenging tasks

hf:2603.23376.task: Physics-aware video world model for robotic manipulation
hf:2603.23376.key_results: SOTA on PBench and EZSbench vs. Veo 3.1, Sora v2 Pro; suppresses unphysical behaviors while preserving visual quality; enables physics-based simulation
hf:2603.23376.comments: DPO-based post-training for physics alignment is practical, but the EZSbench benchmark's ability to generalize to diverse manipulation tasks beyond the training distribution is unclear.

model_io.model: ABot-PhysWorld (14B Diffusion Transformer with DPO post-training)

hypotheses.hypothesis: DPO with decoupled discriminators suppresses unphysical behaviors better than standard likelihood objectives
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: SOTA physical plausibility on PBench and EZSbench

hf:2603.23481.task: Multimodal world modeling incorporating tactile perception
hf:2603.23481.key_results: 90% average success rate on contact-rich manipulation; 80% improvement over pi 0.5 baseline on force-aware tasks like chip pick-and-place
hf:2603.23481.comments: Integrating tactile modality is well-motivated for contact-rich tasks, but the 80% improvement claim against pi 0.5 needs context (is pi 0.5 vision-only or multimodal?).

hypotheses.hypothesis: Tactile perception regularization prevents visual latent dominance in multimodal fusion
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: balanced cross-modal attention achieved

hypotheses.hypothesis: Tactile feedback corrects visual estimation errors in contact-critical scenarios
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: 90% success on contact-rich tasks vs. lower vision-only baselines

hf:2603.23471.task: Regulatory framework analysis for AI agents under EU AI Act
hf:2603.23471.key_results: Identifies mismatch between Act's design (for conventional AI) and challenges of AI agents; proposes institutional and enforcement improvements
hf:2603.23471.comments: Policy analysis is thorough but primarily descriptive; concrete proposals for regulatory amendments would strengthen the work.

hf:2603.22758.task: Object-centric video decomposition with reconstruction-guided slot curriculum
hf:2603.22758.key_results: FG-ARI gains of +6.8 on YouTube-VIS, +8.3 on MOVi-C; addresses over-fragmentation via progressive slot allocation
hf:2603.22758.comments: Slot curriculum and structure-aware loss address real limitations, but the cyclic inference mechanism's contribution to temporal consistency could be isolated more clearly.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Progressive slot allocation prevents over-fragmentation by expanding capacity where reconstruction fails
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: FG-ARI improvements of +6.8 to +8.3

hypotheses.hypothesis: Structure-aware loss sharpens semantic boundaries better than MSE alone
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: local contrast preservation improves slot semantics

hf:2603.21854.task: Empirical analysis of moral reasoning in large language models
hf:2603.21854.key_results: Models exhibit post-conventional reasoning regardless of size/architecture (inverse of human norms); widespread moral decoupling (inconsistency between stated reasoning and action); near-robotic cross-dilemma consistency
hf:2603.21854.comments: Thorough empirical study reveals concerning patterns, but the 'moral ventriloquism' hypothesis conflates rhetorical surface-level sophistication with developmental trajectory in ways that may oversimplify LLM cognition.

model_io.model: LLM-as-judge (multiple judge models for moral stage classification)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Alignment training produces post-conventional reasoning responses across all models regardless of scale
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: striking inversion of human developmental norms

hypotheses.hypothesis: Models exhibit systematic inconsistency between stated moral justification and action choice
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: moral decoupling persists across scale and prompting

hf:2603.22359.task: Modular architecture for multi-protocol AI agent systems
hf:2603.22359.key_results: Unifies 5 interoperability protocols; Caller Profiler learns 20+ behavioral dimensions; skills acquisition system achieves sub-linear memory growth; 413-test suite validates all layers in <3 seconds
hf:2603.22359.comments: STEM Agent's modularity and extensibility are well-designed, but lack of comparison with other agent frameworks limits assessment of practical advantages.

model_io.model: STEM Agent (modular core with protocol handlers, tool bindings, memory subsystems)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Biological pluripotency-inspired differentiation enables a single agent core to adapt across diverse protocols
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: unified gateway unifies 5 protocols

hypotheses.hypothesis: Episodic pruning and semantic deduplication prevent super-linear memory growth
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: sub-linear growth under sustained interaction

hf:2603.22350.task: Temporal authorization for distributed attack detection in AI agents
hf:2603.22350.key_results: SRM achieves F1=1.0000 (0% false positive) on slow-burn attacks; per-turn overhead <250 microseconds; extends stateless gate coverage to trajectory level
hf:2603.22350.comments: Session Risk Memory's deterministic approach to temporal authorization is elegant and efficient, though evaluation is limited to 80 synthetic sessions; real-world attack patterns may differ.

model_io.model: SRM (semantic centroid tracking with exponential moving average risk signal)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Session-level risk tracking detects distributed attacks missed by stateless per-action gates
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: F1=1.0000 on multi-turn attack scenarios

hypotheses.hypothesis: Compact semantic centroid representation enables sub-millisecond per-turn authorization
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: <250 microsecond overhead

nature:10.1038/s41589-026-02169-2.task: Determine if intrinsically disordered protein condensates catalyze nonenzymatic C–N bond formation
nature:10.1038/s41589-026-02169-2.key_results: Condensates drive reductive amination of amines with aldehydes/ketones to form imines and alkylated amines; metabolomics identified previously unknown metabolites from amine-ketone/aldehyde dimerization in cells
nature:10.1038/s41589-026-02169-2.comments: A striking example of how phase-separated biomolecular condensates exhibit emergent chemical reactivity without intrinsic enzymatic domains, suggesting condensates regulate metabolism beyond protein sequestration.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Condensates without inherent enzymatic activity can spontaneously facilitate reductive amination
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: condensates promote C–N bond formation between amines and carbonyl compounds

hypotheses.hypothesis: Condensate-mediated reactions generate metabolites not produced in dispersed conditions
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: combinatorial metabolomics revealed previously unknown amine-ketone/aldehyde dimerization products

nature:10.1038/s41418-026-01716-7.task: Characterize role of E3 ligase Stub1 in TBK1 degradation via chaperone-mediated autophagy during viral infection
nature:10.1038/s41418-026-01716-7.key_results: Stub1 targets TBK1 for CMA-mediated degradation through K344 ubiquitination (K27-linked); HSC70/HspA8 recognizes ubiquitinated TBK1 for LAMP2A-mediated autophagic degradation; Stub1-deficient mice show increased VSV/HSV-1 resistance and elevated type I IFN
nature:10.1038/s41418-026-01716-7.comments: Identifies TBK1-Stub1 axis as CMA-dependent inhibitor of antiviral immunity; mechanistic detail on ubiquitin linkage specificity is noteworthy; potential therapeutic target for enhancing antiviral responses.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Stub1 inhibits antiviral immunity by targeting TBK1 for CMA
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; Stub1 deficiency increases antiviral resistance

hypotheses.hypothesis: K27-linked ubiquitination of TBK1 at K344 targets it to LAMP2A-mediated autophagy
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; U73122 blocks the TBK1-Stub1 interaction and ubiquitination

nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08571-x.task: Dissect isoform-specific mechanisms of p53-mediated apoptosis and senescence-associated tumorigenesis
nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08571-x.key_results: p53-B triggers transcription-independent apoptosis via Dronc activation; all isoforms promote tumorigenesis through JNK-mediated senescence; findings partly conserved in human p53
nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08571-x.comments: Elegant use of Drosophila genetics to reveal complexity of p53 isoform function; transcription-independent apoptotic mechanism is noteworthy but applicability to mammals requires validation.

hypotheses.hypothesis: p53-B induces apoptosis independently of cell cycle status
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; p53-B but not p53-A/E activates Dronc in non-proliferative cells

hypotheses.hypothesis: p53 isoforms promote tumorigenesis via JNK-mediated senescence
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; senescent cells accumulate when apoptosis is blocked

nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08572-w.task: Define ME1 role in HCC tumorigenesis and lenvatinib resistance via ferroptosis suppression
nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08572-w.key_results: ME1 upregulated in HCC and correlates with poor prognosis; ME1-dependent NADPH production activates FSP1-CoQH2 axis to block ferroptosis; Me1 knockout restores lenvatinib sensitivity
nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08572-w.comments: Well-mechanized study linking metabolism to drug resistance; ferroptosis evasion as resistance mechanism is increasingly relevant but the NADPH-FSP1-CoQH2 axis may be druggable.

hypotheses.hypothesis: ME1 promotes HCC progression through ferroptosis inhibition
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; ME1 overexpression confers lenvatinib resistance via NADPH-FSP1-CoQH2 axis

hypotheses.hypothesis: ME1 knockout restores drug sensitivity
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; Me1 deletion reduces tumor burden and re-sensitizes cells to lenvatinib

nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08612-5.task: Elucidate lactate-mediated macrophage polarization driving splenomegaly in acute erythroleukemia
nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08612-5.key_results: Lactate directly induces M1 macrophage polarization; self-reinforcing cycle generates lactate accumulation in splenic microenvironment; Oxamate (lactate inhibitor) reverses M1 polarization, ameliorates splenomegaly and extends survival
nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08612-5.comments: Identifies lactate as a key immunomodulatory factor in AEL pathogenesis; the feedback amplification loop is elegant but specificity of lactate effects versus other glycolytic metabolites warrants clarification.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Lactate drives M1 macrophage polarization in AEL splenic microenvironment
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; lactate alone induces M1 polarization in vitro

hypotheses.hypothesis: Lactate-driven M1 polarization creates self-reinforcing cycle
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; M1 macrophages increase glycolytic activity and lactate production

nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08614-3.task: Establish role of TPTE phosphatase in spermatogenesis via PI(4,5)P2 synthesis
nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08614-3.key_results: TPTE-deficiency reduced sperm count and motility; TPTE regulates AKT/mTOR-dependent PDLIM1 translation during spermiogenesis and RAD50 expression during meiosis
nature:10.1038/s41419-026-08614-3.comments: Novel mechanistic link between a testis-specific PTEN family member and male infertility through lipid signaling; potential clinical relevance to non-obstructive azoospermia.

hypotheses.hypothesis: TPTE generates PI(4,5)P2 to inhibit AKT/mTOR signaling during spermiogenesis
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; TPTE deficiency impairs flagellar development through dysregulation of PDLIM1 translation

hypotheses.hypothesis: TPTE regulates DNA double-strand break repair during meiosis
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; TPTE controls RAD50 expression and homologous recombination initiation

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70310-9.task: Characterize SLIT3 fragment-mediated coordination of brown adipogenesis, angiogenesis, and sympathetic innervation
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70310-9.key_results: SLIT3 cleaved into SLIT3-N (angiogenesis) and SLIT3-C (sympathetic innervation) fragments; PLXNA1 identified as SLIT3-C receptor essential for sympathetic innervation; BMP1 identified as first vertebrate SLIT protease; coordinated neurovascular response to cold exposure
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70310-9.comments: Elegant bifurcated signaling mechanism ensuring synchronized brown adipose tissue activation; identification of BMP1 as SLIT protease is novel; adipocyte progenitors emerge as key regulators of tissue innervation.

hypotheses.hypothesis: SLIT3 fragments mediate tissue crosstalk during brown adipogenesis
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; distinct SLIT3-N and SLIT3-C fragments coordinate angiogenesis and innervation

hypotheses.hypothesis: PLXNA1 is essential for SLIT3-C-mediated sympathetic innervation
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; PLXNA1 identified as SLIT3-C receptor required for innervation

hypotheses.hypothesis: BMP1 cleaves SLIT3 in vertebrates
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; BMP1 identified as first described vertebrate SLIT protease

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70965-4.task: Evaluate therapeutic potential of NAD+ precursor NRH on metabolic disease
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70965-4.key_results: Chronic NRH (100 mg/kg/day) well-tolerated with minimal effects on normal diet; mitigates high-fat diet-induced glucose intolerance and improves hepatic lipid catabolism gene expression
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70965-4.comments: Promising preventive and therapeutic agent for metabolic complications, but dose-dependent toxicity and limited efficacy in normal conditions suggest need for optimization in target populations.

hypotheses.hypothesis: NRH improves metabolic outcomes in high-fat diet-induced obesity
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; improved glucose tolerance and increased lipid catabolism genes

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-39509-0.task: Elucidate molecular mechanisms of BDMV-mediated platelet activation in aspirin-treated cells
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-39509-0.key_results: BDMVs express COX-1 and activate aspirin-treated platelets through PLC/PKC/Akt phosphorylation; U73122 (PLC inhibitor) blocks PKC phosphorylation; BDMV+arachidonic acid synergistically activate platelets
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-39509-0.comments: Identifies compensatory mechanism for platelet activation post-hemorrhage despite aspirin therapy; COX-1 presence on BDMVs may partially explain aspirin-resistant thrombosis.

hypotheses.hypothesis: BDMVs activate aspirin-treated platelets via PLC/PKC pathway
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; U73122 blockade of PLC reduces downstream PKC phosphorylation

hypotheses.hypothesis: COX-1 on BDMVs counteracts aspirin inhibition
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; BDMVs express COX-1 and synergize with arachidonic acid to activate platelets

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43060-3.task: Determine role of heat shock factor-1 in endoplasmic reticulum unfolded protein response
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43060-3.key_results: HSF-1 is required for efficient UPRER activation in C. elegans; HSF-1 activity essential for tunicamycin-induced ER stress tolerance; mRNA levels of UPRER genes regulated by HSF1 in human cell lines
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43060-3.comments: Reveals cross-talk between heat shock response and ER stress response pathways; HSF-1 regulation of UPRER genes suggests broader role in cellular stress coordination than previously appreciated.

model_io.model: HSF-1 in C. elegans stress response

hypotheses.hypothesis: HSF-1 is required for efficient UPRER activation
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; HSF-1 deficiency impairs ER stress response gene induction

hypotheses.hypothesis: HSF-1 regulates UPRER genes across species
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; HSF1-regulated UPRER mRNA levels detected in human cell lines

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-45319-1.task: Determine role of EphA2/ephrinA1 signaling in hyperoxia-induced acute lung injury and barrier preservation
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-45319-1.key_results: Hyperoxia increases phospho-EphA2 and disrupts VE-cadherin, ZO-2, claudin-5; anti-EphA2 mAb pretreatment preserved junctional proteins, enhanced Akt phosphorylation, reduced apoptosis and oxidative stress, improved survival (p=0.045)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-45319-1.comments: Demonstrates pharmacological targeting of EphA2 as barrier-protective strategy under hyperoxic stress; mechanistic link between Eph signaling and tight junction maintenance is well-supported.

hypotheses.hypothesis: EphA2 activation disrupts alveolar-endothelial barrier during hyperoxia
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; hyperoxia increases phospho-EphA2 and disrupts junctional proteins

hypotheses.hypothesis: EphA2 blockade preserves barrier integrity and improves outcomes
hypotheses.result: Confirmed; anti-EphA2 mAb preserves junctional proteins and extends survival

nature:10.1038/s44385-026-00080-y.task: Propose developmental reprogramming strategy to restore cardiac regenerative capacity in adult hearts
nature:10.1038/s44385-026-00080-y.key_results: Cardiac regeneration traded for high-output contractility during evolution; developmental trade-off involves metabolic/epigenetic regulation and microenvironmental maturation; cardiac aging recapitulates disruption of developmental regulatory mechanisms
nature:10.1038/s44385-026-00080-y.comments: Conceptual review proposing reactivation of juvenile regulatory networks through transcription factor induction, metabolic reprogramming, and niche modulation; lacks experimental validation but provides strategic framework for future studies.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Reactivating juvenile regulatory networks can restore cardiomyocyte proliferative potential
hypotheses.result: Proposed but not yet experimentally validated

hypotheses.hypothesis: Cardiac aging mechanisms mirror developmental withdrawal from cell cycle
hypotheses.result: Proposed based on comparative regulatory analysis

nature:10.1038/s41528-026-00563-3.task: Super-resolution tactile sensing via origami-inspired capacitive e-skin with ML enhancement
nature:10.1038/s41528-026-00563-3.key_results: 60000 mm² coverage; super-resolution factor 241; localization error <3.5 mm, force magnitude error <0.04 N; multi-point touch for non-adjacent loads via integrated theoretical models and ML
nature:10.1038/s41528-026-00563-3.comments: Bio-inspired origami design with shear and proximity sensing; ML-enhanced super-resolution achieves practical tactile feedback for human-machine interaction.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Origami deformation transmission enables super-resolution tactile sensing via ML

nature:10.1038/s41597-026-07101-w.task: Benchmark dataset creation for aerial anomaly detection in forests
nature:10.1038/s41597-026-07101-w.key_results: Crowd-sourced labeled dataset of hard-to-detect anomalies under occlusion; existing methods performed poorly, indicating need for context-aware approaches
nature:10.1038/s41597-026-07101-w.comments: Real-world dataset from actual search operation; limited quantitative evaluation of detection methods reported.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-36998-x.task: Lightweight quantum-ready encryption for resource-constrained IoT devices
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-36998-x.key_results: TTEA reduces energy by 39%, memory by 40%, execution time by 20% vs. TEA; avalanche effect 48.5%; ciphertext entropy 7.98 bits/128B; resistant to differential/linear/side-channel attacks and quantum threats (CRYSTALS-Kyber integrated)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-36998-x.comments: Practical cryptographic design balancing post-quantum security with IoT energy constraints; strong security analysis across classical and quantum threats.

model_io.model: TTEA (20×20 S-box + adaptive key scheduling + CRYSTALS-Kyber)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Adaptive key scheduling reduces energy overhead while maintaining security against differential/quantum attacks
hypotheses.result: TTEA 39% energy reduction vs. TEA with avalanche 48.5% and quantum resistance via post-quantum key exchange

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-37940-x.task: Thermoelastic wave propagation in semiconductor materials under pulsed laser and electromagnetic coupling
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-37940-x.key_results: Coupled model integrates photothermal, mechanical, and carrier-density effects; normal mode analysis yields analytical solutions; silicon case study shows effects of hall current, laser pulse, initial stress via MATHEMATICA simulations
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-37940-x.comments: Novel formulation combining photo-elastic, photo-electronic deformations, and hall current effects; theoretical contribution without experimental validation.

inputs: initial stress, laser pulse parameters, electromagnetic field

hypotheses.hypothesis: Initial stress significantly alters thermoelastic wave propagation in semiconductors under laser irradiation

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-38799-8.task: Point cloud segmentation of blast rock fragments via concavity-based pre-segmentation
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-38799-8.key_results: ~80% accuracy in distinguishing rock fragment segmentation states; robust large-fragment segmentation without over/under-segmentation; superior to four state-of-the-art methods

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41712-y.task: Explainable hybrid feature selection for coronary artery disease diagnosis
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41712-y.key_results: SHOW algorithm selects 14 features (55 available) from Z-Alizadeh Sani, achieving 93.79% accuracy; 5 features (13 available) from Cleveland, 86.52% accuracy; outperforms 14 state-of-the-art methods
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41712-y.comments: SHAP-based ranking with sequential wrapper selection; strong clinical metrics (sensitivity, specificity, AUC); extensive validation across three datasets and seven classifiers.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43523-7.task: Multi-scale behavior recognition in caged laying hens via enhanced YOLOv8
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43523-7.key_results: mAP@50: eating 98.15%, open-mouth breathing 81.03%, self-pecking 93.65%, mutual pecking 94.32%; 2.26% overall mAP improvement with 22.92% model size reduction vs. baseline

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44410-x.task: Network topology characterization via graphlet orbit adjacency vs. random walks
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44410-x.key_results: Orbit adjacency consistently outperforms random-walk embeddings on node-label prediction across 40 real-world networks; random walks capture only subset of local patterns and obscure structurally informative signals
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44410-x.comments: Theoretical analysis demonstrates fundamental limitations of random-walk methods; empirical validation across social, technological, biological domains.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Random walks miss higher-order structural patterns critical for topology-function relationships

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44705-z.task: Label-free microparticle classification via hyper-dimensional computing and event-based imaging
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44705-z.key_results: 98.67% classification accuracy for four particle sizes using ground-glass diffuser; HDC achieves efficient post-processing with low computational overhead; label-free alternative to fluorescent labeling

hypotheses.hypothesis: Ground-glass diffuser enhances optical diversity for improved HDC-based particle classification

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44805-w.task: Contact event detection in youth ice hockey from single-view video
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44805-w.key_results: 86.4% head-impact recall; reduces manual review from 3+ hours to <30 minutes per game; TSM classifier with 1.5× crop and 1:9 imbalance ratio optimal

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-45083-2.task: Wheat head detection in aerial imagery via bidirectional state space modeling
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-45083-2.key_results: Mamba-WheatNet achieves mAP@50 superior to YOLOv13; outperforms RT-DETR with lower computational cost; state-of-the-art on VisDrone2019 benchmark

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-45139-3.key_results: MPA-HGSO achieves FND 2151 rounds, HND 2160 rounds vs. LEACH 1115/1290; average transmission delay 140 ms (44% reduction vs. conventional); balances energy consumption, network lifetime, and communication efficiency

nature:10.1038/s41599-026-06999-2.task: Feature importance ranking for L2 compound word processing stages via supervised ML

hypotheses.hypothesis: Linguistic features have differential effects across temporal processing stages

nature:10.1038/s41612-026-01387-8.task: Dual-path deep learning for sensor-agnostic hyperspectral methane plume detection
nature:10.1038/s41612-026-01387-8.key_results: Enhancement-based models exhibit higher segmentation accuracy across plume scales; radiance-based models avoid preprocessing overhead (matched filtering) and enable rapid screening; both maintain competitive performance with explainable features consistent with CH4 absorption
nature:10.1038/s41612-026-01387-8.comments: Expert-validated datasets from EMIT and Tanager-1; cross-sensor evaluation demonstrates architectural robustness; physics-grounded XAI validation strengthens scientific credibility.

nature:10.1038/s42256-026-01195-y.task: Long-range interaction modeling in molecular systems via efficient attention
nature:10.1038/s42256-026-01195-y.key_results: Euclidean Fast Attention (EFA) achieves linear-complexity attention for molecular data; enables MLFFs to capture long-range effects conventional methods miss

nature:10.1038/s44333-026-00097-1.task: Causal discovery of on-demand food delivery delays via Bayesian causal inference and double ML
nature:10.1038/s44333-026-00097-1.key_results: 16.7% delay rate in 405,180 Chinese OFD orders; pickup/transport duration strongest causal effects; delay propagation first identified—prior delays increase subsequent delays; actionable insights for operational optimization

nature:10.1038/s44335-026-00060-w.task: Digital compute-in-memory Ising annealer for combinatorial optimization via probabilistic SRAM
nature:10.1038/s44335-026-00060-w.key_results: Solves 96-city TSP in 620 µs with 961 nJ energy; 15×–572× improvement in hardware cost ratio vs. prior TSP solvers; intrinsic SRAM process variations generate probabilistic bits without external RNG

hypotheses.hypothesis: Intrinsic SRAM process variations enable area-efficient probabilistic annealing without dedicated RNG
hypotheses.result: 96-city TSP solved in 620µs/961nJ with 15×–572× hardware cost improvement over prior solvers

nature:10.1038/s44387-026-00077-3.key_results: Transformer predicts minimum Hamming distance; combined with genetic algorithm reduces search space for champion codes; method applicable to toric, Reed–Muller, BCH, algebrogeometric, and potentially quantum codes
nature:10.1038/s44387-026-00077-3.comments: Novel application of deep learning to classical coding theory; expands known champion codes across multiple code families.

nature:10.1038/s44455-026-00024-x.task: Online high-temperature monitoring in FDM additive manufacturing via metamaterial-based buffer rod
nature:10.1038/s44455-026-00024-x.key_results: Corn-shaped meta-buffer rod accurately records surface temperatures up to 190 °C; 60.9% mass reduction vs. conventional designs; ANN-optimized TPMS thermal channel; diffuse-wave ultrasonic channel with 7% porosity
nature:10.1038/s44455-026-00024-x.comments: Machine-learning-assisted design of metamaterial thermal/ultrasonic channels; addresses practical FDM quality control challenge with innovative materials approach.

hypotheses.hypothesis: ANN-optimized TPMS thermal channel with ultrasonic diffuse-wave detection enables high-temperature monitoring

nature:10.1038/s41377-026-02271-z.comments: Impressive optoelectronic and mechanical performance achieved through systematic materials engineering; long-term color stability and degradation mechanisms under repeated stretching remain underexplored.

nature:10.1038/s41378-026-01222-3.task: Extreme-sensitivity label-free biosensing via topological phase singularity in plasmonic nanostructures
nature:10.1038/s41378-026-01222-3.key_results: Refractive-index sensitivity 3.27×10⁸ nm RIU⁻¹; refractive-index resolution 3.67×10⁻⁷ RIU; detection of 244 Da biotin at femtomolar concentration; TNF-α detection at 100 zeptomolar (10⁻²¹ mol L⁻¹)

hypotheses.hypothesis: Sub-nanometer silver nanoparticle spacing generates sharp topological phase singularities for label-free biosensing

nature:10.1038/s41378-026-01252-x.task: Engineering tunable flexible capacitive pressure sensor via buckling-guided assembly for dynamic pressure monitoring
nature:10.1038/s41378-026-01252-x.key_results: Pressure sensitivity tunable via nonlinear electrode-spacing variation; >6000 cycle durability; ~2 Pa detection limit; 4% hysteresis; 131/140 ms response/recovery times; reversible tuning by lateral strain
nature:10.1038/s41378-026-01252-x.comments: Elegant geometric design exploiting buckling mechanics achieves impressive performance metrics; wind-tunnel validation demonstrates practical robustness, though long-term aging in harsh environments warrants further study.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Nonlinear electrode-spacing variation enables load-dependent sensitivity tuning

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-39770-3.task: Design of compact wideband 4×4 MIMO antenna array for 5G millimeter-wave FR2 applications
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-39770-3.key_results: Impedance bandwidth 8 GHz (24–32 GHz); peak gain 6 dBi at 27.5 GHz; mutual coupling −25/−20 dB at 25/29 GHz; ECC <0.001; diversity gain ~10 dB; footprint 40×40×0.8 mm³

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42525-9.task: Elucidating the atomic structure and origin of super-cooled nearly-commensurate charge density wave state in 1T-TaS₂ nanocrystals
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42525-9.key_results: Rapid cooling produces mixed-phase configuration with both NCCDW and CCDW structural motifs; suppresses lattice-volume expansion anomaly observed during gradual cooling; SC-NCCDW represents kinetically-frozen intermediate structure
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42525-9.comments: HR-TEM provides direct structural evidence of metastable intermediate states, revealing how kinetic pathways stabilize non-equilibrium phases in layered correlated systems.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43460-5.key_results: Ultra-broadband supercontinuum spanning 650–1300 nm; relative intensity noise <0.5%; optical phase deviation <15 mrad; phase noise −150 dBc/Hz at 10 kHz offset

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44746-4.task: Characterizing Auger–Meitner recombination and spin dynamics in single quantum dots

hf:2603.22330.key_results: Foundation models achieved highest held-out accuracy but lost most advantage out-of-distribution; structured decoders remained more robust across 29 predictors tested on 170,083 RNA sequences

hf:2603.22570.task: Active vision foundation model for efficient scene perception

hf:2603.23488.task: Monocular novel view synthesis from single images

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-71101-y.task: Elucidate biogenesis and function of annulate lamellae in nuclear pore assembly

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42417-y.task: Assess synergistic apoptosis induction by decitabine and metformin in gastric cancer

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44632-z.task: Test edelfosine-induced cell-cycle arrest and apoptosis in vascular smooth muscle cells for neointimal hyperplasia suppression

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44632-z.comments: Demonstrates dual anti-proliferative and pro-apoptotic mechanism via ER stress and Ca²⁺ influx, with promising in vivo efficacy for restenosis prevention.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Edelfosine induces G2/M arrest and caspase-dependent apoptosis

hypotheses.hypothesis: ER stress and Ca²⁺ influx mediate edelfosine apoptosis
hypotheses.result: confirmed; Ca²⁺ chelation and VGCC blockade reduced effects

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70509-w.task: AI-powered clinical trial recommendation and patient-to-trial matching
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70509-w.key_results: 92% of oncology patients had relevant trial in top-20 recommendations; >90% accuracy in criterion-level eligibility classification

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44568-4.task: Characterization of thiosemicarbazones as anticancer/antiparasitic agents via computational and cellular assays
